programme.title: Forbidden History: Top Secret Nazi UFOs
programme.desc: Investigating claims that the Nazis had developed a brand new flying craft at a secret research facility in Northern Germany and that the Americans and Russians stole this technology after the war.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Secrets of the Alchemists
programme.desc: Nostradamus, Nicolas Flamel and John Dee were alchemists that had a profound effect on the world. Find out if they were clever deceivers or if they really could perform miracles.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret Societies: Mystery and Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigate if there's any truth to conspiracy theories that allege secret societies control the course of world history from behind-the scenes, and if true, new discoveries might finally reveal the extent of their global domination.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secrets of the Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican Archives hold the personal documents of past Popes, including pieces such as Galileo's trial transcript and King Henry VIII's annulment request. What else is hidden in the Vatican Library a place that is out of bounds even to Cardinals?

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Mystery of the Giants
programme.desc: Discover why so many of our cultures refer to giants and if they were myths or could have actually walked the earth. See the tombs and skeletons discovered in Sardinia, where evidence of giants may have been found.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Treasure of Solomon
programme.desc: The High Priests of the Temple in Jerusalem could have hidden their most sacred items before the city was sacked by the Romans and the Dead Sea Scrolls could actually be a treasure map to these hidden wonders. See what else lies under this ancient city.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Oracles of the Dead
programme.desc: The Oracles were thought to be young women of the underworld who were consulted by ancient Greek society, and their visions helped shape the course of history. Find the truth behind their extraordinary trances and apparent psychic powers.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Lost Treasures of Petra
programme.desc: It is one of the great wonders of the ancient world, but there is little information on who built the magnificent city of Petra in Jordan and why. See what treasure remains buried there and the dark secrets that remain in this mysterious place.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Dead Sea Scrolls Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigated the Dead Sea Scrolls, which have been kept top-secret for decades by the Vatican. These could reveal the location of tunnel holding billions of dollars of treasure.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret History of Jesus
programme.desc: Experts use new discoveries to reveal the true story of Jesus Christ, and using cutting-edge tech, this critical evidence is challenging everything we know about the man who changed history.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Lost Treasure of the Templars
programme.desc: The Knights Templar may have discovered a great treasure in Jerusalem and brought it back to Europe to become more powerful than the Pope itself. We try to solve the mystery of why this treasure disappeared.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Dark Truths of the Templars
programme.desc: Templar fact and fiction have become blurred by their depictions in book and on film. However, we present a very different picture that challenges head on the orthodox beliefs about an order that angered much of Europe, particularly France.

programme.title: Forbidden History: In Search of King Arthur
programme.desc: The legend of King Arthur is one of a courageous fighter and leader in battle, but for centuries, the fabled king has been a mystery to historians. Find out if his story of Camelot, Excalibur and Guinevere just an elaborate fairytale.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Kevin/ Jason
programme.desc: People who have lead the police on high-speed car chases share their experiences and stories. They also explain what was going through their heads while they were being pursued.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Justin/ Frank
programme.desc: A struggling father resorts to illegal means to make a living, leading him into a situation involving stolen property; a doting grandfather ends up on the wrong side of the law and flees after being pulled over

programme.desc: As a student at New York Military Academy, John Gotti Jr. learned of his father's meteoric rise to power in the world of organized crime.

programme.title: Gotti: Godfather and Son: Fathers and Sons
programme.desc: The FBI is focused on taking down Gotti and the Gambino Crime family, as well as the bosses of all five New York mafia clans.

programme.desc: Examine the history and inmate roster of what was once America's most humane prison.

programme.desc: Built on farmland, 'The Rock' was infamous as the site of stabbings and a decapitation.

programme.title: The Big House: Folsom

programme.title: The Big House: Colorado State
programme.desc: Filmmakers explore one of America's harshest security facilities and its rich past.

programme.title: Rookies: Tampa: The Birth of a Rookie
programme.desc: Rookie Denny Cooper's father-in-law questions his decision to join the police when his wife is about to give birth and Dennis is off restraining a husband after a hit-and-run. Rookie Hugh Herndon begins on the wild streets of Tampa.

programme.title: Rookies: Jefferson: Step Up or Step Off
programme.desc: FTO Michael is concerned about a rookie's shyness who fails a simple, important test.

programme.title: Rookies: Tampa: Class Begins
programme.desc: Rookie A.J. Cafaro sees his first dead body; Hugh Herndon decides to become a cop and leave his teaching career behind.

programme.title: Rookies: Jefferson: Riding Solo
programme.desc: Henry Conravey has successfully completed 12 weeks of field training but after a series of mistakes is not sure he'll be allowed to patrol the streets on his own. Chris Cade is looking forward to getting is own patrol car.

programme.title: Monstresses: Katie Belflower & Brandita Taliano
programme.desc: 2003, Livermore, California: 17-year old Katie Bellflower seduces a high school classmate's husband, 20-year old Mike Simons. The young Monstress is willing to kill not just once--but twice--to keep Simons to herself.

programme.title: Monstresses: Diana Haun & Morgan Hughes
programme.desc: In 1996, Ventura, California, 32 year old supermarket clerk Diana Haun thinks she has met her soul mate in co-worker Michael Dally when the two start a steamy affair. Diane decides to do whatever it takes to get rid of Michael's wife, Sherri.

programme.title: Monstresses: Elizabeth Reynolds & Linda Henning
programme.desc: In 2003 Kingsville, Texas, Elizabeth Reynolds claims she's divorced when she gets involved with 39-year-old Al Benitez. But when he finds out she's still married, he tries to break it off. She goes berserk and hires a man to get her revenge on Al.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Texas Showdown
programme.desc: Two SUVs and a motorcycle race down a Texas highway. In this high speed chase between both the wife AND mistress of Bill Hall his life would hinge on a U-turn and detectives would have to decide if this was reckless driving...or murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Don't Scream
programme.desc: A young mom calls 911 claiming she cut her own throat in front of her ex-husband and child. Doctors say there’s no way she did it to herself.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Lorenzen Wright: No Defense
programme.desc: A hometown hero is gunned down in the woods, and seven years later police get a tip that changes everything. 48 Hours explores the question of who killed basketball star Lorenzen Wright.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: To Kiss or to Kill
programme.desc: April and Brad are happily married until her dreams of having a baby fall apart. Heartbroken, April turns to other men for consolation. One even moves in with the couple. But when Brad is ultimately replaced as the man of the house, everyone pays a price.

programme.title: Body Cam: Shots Fired
programme.desc: A domestic dispute turns into a hostage situation with children's lives at stake; an apparent vehicle accident turns into a shocking multiple murder with armed killers on the run; a disturbance at a liquor store leaves an officer fighting for his life.

programme.title: Body Cam: Officer Down
programme.desc: Officers find themselves pitted against a lone gunman holed up in a suburban home; the nerve of a rookie cop is tested when a routine stop on the highway goes horribly wrong.

programme.title: Body Cam: Code 30
programme.desc: In New York state, a domestic disturbance takes a violent turn which changes a police chief's life. In Florida an officer chasing 2 suspects is separated from his K9. And in Indiana, an Officer stares down the barrel of a suspect's gun.

programme.title: Body Cam: The Chase
programme.desc: A dangerous felon has stolen a truck and will ram anything in his path; On a freezing winter night a lone officer is attacked by a crazed half naked man; At a County Jail, a gunman fires at unarmed officers, leaving one fighting for his life.

programme.title: Body Cam: Cover Me
programme.desc: Two police officers respond to a domestic disturbance that ends in tragedy. A terrifying house fire turns into a murder investigation. The search for a known sex offender builds to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Body Cam: Under Siege
programme.desc: On New Year's Eve, a domestic dispute ends in tragedy when two deputies are trapped with a gun-wielding suspect; in Iowa, a high-speed pursuit escalates to a gruesome conclusion.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: To Kiss or to Kill
programme.desc: April and Brad are happily married until her dreams of having a baby fall apart. Heartbroken, April turns to other men for consolation. One even moves in with the couple. But when Brad is ultimately replaced as the man of the house, everyone pays a price.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: The Millionaire's Mistress
programme.desc: Dionne Baugh begins a steamy affair with millionaire Lance Herndon behind her husband's back. Unknown to Dionne, Lance sees other women, underestimating the intensity of her feelings. Their lust triggers a deadly spiral towards jealousy and murder.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Hot and Sweet
programme.desc: When one of three people in a love triangle is found brutally murdered, the affair is exposed and a manhunt begins.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Freeway Phantom
programme.desc: In 1971 and '72, Washington DC is terrorized by a cunning killer who abducts and murders six young African American girls. Police and the community are outraged by the serial killings that target young children in their own neighborhoods.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: A Killing in Chinatown
programme.desc: Art imitates life when Cambodian genocide survivor Dr. Haing Ngor wins an Oscar for his role in the film The Killing Fields. But when he's gunned down the LAPD investigate a web of political intrigue, revenge and street gangs to uncover the truth.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Nine Years in the Shadows
programme.desc: When a young woman is found murdered in her Modesto, CA home in 1988, police investigate the strife and infidelity on both sides of her marriage. But it's a surprising witness who eventually leads police to her killer.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: She Was Gone
programme.desc: Three months after high school sweethearts, Lisa and Jimmy Moore, end their marriage, Lisa disappears. Fearing the worst, her family file a missing person report, but the police have no leads, no witnesses, but they do know that someone is lying.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Warning Signs
programme.desc: A Deputy reports a 1990 Dodge Intrepid pushed over an embankment just south of Gig Harbor, Washington. He investigates and discovers the dead body of missing Puyallup father, Randall Ferguson, in the trunk. He had been shot twice in the head.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Wheeling and Dealing
programme.desc: Feb. 24, 1996, Frank Black Jr., the owner of a school bus company, goes missing. The FBI needs to determine if he is dead, and where's his body? It's a mystery built on lies that can only be solved when someone is brave enough, to tell the truth.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Cult of Personality
programme.desc: In 2014 a 911 call reports gunshots at the home of TV host Scott Rogers. As detectives work to piece together the events that led up to what looks like a murder-suicide, they soon discover a trail of lies from England all the way to Louisiana.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Ex's and Alibis
programme.desc: On December 3, 200, Louisiana Melton and her boyfriend Phillip Brown are found shot dead. Detective Harris of the Houston Police Department has little evidence from the crime scene, a large list of potential suspects, and one huge lie.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Once an Animal
programme.desc: A cold case from Northern California heats up when Detective Molly Daul ties a brutal assault case she's working on to this twelve year old murder. And when this killer strikes in Portland, multiple homicide detectives team up to take him down.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: A Mystery in the Pines
programme.desc: Caught in a love triangle, young chef and mom Heather Mallory vanishes. Now Portland detectives and Heather's parents search for the truth in an investigation involving wiretaps, confidential informants and a dramatic resolution deep in the forest.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Pacific Terror
programme.desc: When Detective Molly Daul works two homicides back to back, she realizes she's dealing with a sexual predator who targets trusting young women. Arrested before he can kill again in Seattle, his chilling confession remains with Molly to this day.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican is a secretive, watchful institution that protects its reputation and the members of its ranks with fierce, often reckless abandon. The secrets and scandals throughout its history are some of the darkest.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Kennedy Killings
programme.desc: Conspiracy theories surrounding the assassination of Robert Kennedy, the murder of TV presenter Jill Dando and the death of government weapons inspector Dr. David Kelly are examined.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Country Legend's Tour Bus
programme.desc: Christopher Gay is in jail for petty theft and known for his ability to escape. But on top of this, Gay is known for his choice in getaway vehicles. This cross-country chase is hardly a joy ride, as the cops are resolute on capturing him for good.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Family Coming After Me
programme.desc: After a fight in a mall, Eric Quesada murders his ex-best friend in a drive-by shooting. He goes on the run to Mexico, where he is caught by Mexican officials. Quesada spends two years fighting extradition before being sent back to the US.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Boyfriend to Support
programme.desc: In jail for fraud, Steven Russell falls in love with inmate Philip Morris. When Morris is released, Russell is desperate to be reunited. He escapes from jail with elaborate cons. Once out, the two live a lavish life, supported by scams that alert the FBI.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Raps
programme.desc: Raymond Ross skips town after beating a teen into a coma. With his cousin, who is also wanted, Ross enters the drug scene selling dope and his own music. After a close call, Ross decides to let loose and party hard while police close in on this trail.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Make It in the Big Easy
programme.desc: Jeremy Woods convinced his girlfriend to forge bad checks and then murdered her and her son.

programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.desc: Brett restores a 1941 modern ranch in Redlands, CA, for a couple who recently inherited the home from her grandfather.

programme.title: Restored: Dutch Colonial Done Right

programme.title: Restored: 1927 Arts and Crafts Bungalow

programme.title: Restored: 1930 Simple Spanish Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett helps a recently-divorced mom who is in over her head with her cute Spanish bungalow in Riverside, California. He opts for a simplistic approach in his restoration of the exterior areas and kitchen.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Vermont Stone House
programme.desc: Novice builder Danny Clark attempts to construct a 600-square-foot stone cabin in Vermont's White River Valley. The home is sure to be a true work of art but his inexperience, the harsh winter and the unusual architecture push him to his limits.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Mountain House
programme.desc: A creative family builds a custom home where the mountains and desert collide in Colorado's last frontier. The dream project quickly turns into a job when the harsh terrain combines with the demanding pace they've set for themselves.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Woodland Expedition
programme.desc: A young man is designing his first home on family land in rural Illinois to be off the grid and on the go. He and his buddy combine their experience as long-distance travelers to improvise their build through a Midwest winter.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Streamside Cottage
programme.desc: Professional treehouse builder Michael 'Murph' Murphy wants to build a cottage retreat for his family in Washington. He enlists his friends to create a natural siding and a massive fishing net for lounging above the living space.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Bottle Island
programme.desc: John Beal is ready to leave the city behind and embrace a life off the grid in Isla Mujeres, Mexico. He hires Richart Sowa and his son Eden to build an eco-friendly private floating island made from recycled plastic bottles.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Derby Dolls
programme.desc: Four bakers try to elbow past the competition for a chance to bring their cupcakes to a party celebrating the Los Angeles Derby Dolls.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Renaissance Faire
programme.desc: It's a blast from the past as four cupcake bakers fight for a place at the VIP party for the 50th anniversary of the Renaissance Faire in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Cake Wars: Champs: Shrek
programme.desc: Four returning champions do battle for the chance to have their cake as the centerpiece of a party celebrating the 10th anniversary of everyone's favorite ogre, Shrek!

programme.title: Cake Wars: Champs: Lego
programme.desc: Four champions return to the 'Cake Wars' kitchen to build the most amazing cakes of all time in honour of some of the most iconic toys of all time, Lego! Only one champion will reign supreme and have their cake as the centrepiece of the party.

programme.title: Cake Wars: Champs: Disney Princesses
programme.desc: It's an adventure for the ages with Cinderella, Ariel, Princess Jasmine and many more, as four champion bakers battle to have their amazing cake creation as the centrepiece of a party celebrating Disney's princesses.

programme.title: Cookie Wars: Cookie Carnival
programme.desc: Three teams of cookie decorators and sugar artists create gravity-defying, 3-D worlds using cookies and sugar. The final two have just five hours to create a massive, realistic cookie carnival.

programme.title: Cake Wars: Champs: The Avengers
programme.desc: Four champion cake artists will have to suit up and harness their baking superpowers when Marvel's The Avengers fly into the Cake Wars Champs kitchen.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Farm Fresh
programme.desc: Alfonso showcases foods with farm-fresh ingredients. Go hog wild over Benton's Bacon, see the Georgian pecans going into Carolina Foods' Duchess Pecan Pies.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Freaky Flavors
programme.desc: Alfonso highlights snacks with some freaky flavors! From Upton's Naturals Bacon Seitan to the Smoked Nib Brittle from Olive and Sinclair, to Trolli Sour Brite Crawlers, these curious treats are good eats.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Little Bits
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro explores little treats with big flavor like the colorful Carousel gumballs at Ford Gum, Ghirardelli Chocolate's decadent semi-sweet Baking Chips and the tasty Duchess Gem Donuts from Carolina Foods.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Pop Stars
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro explores some treats with serious pop. He'll pop the top of a Snapple Kiwi Strawberry beverage, pop a bubble with the classic Big League Chew shredded bubblegum, and get the inside scoop at Pez.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Quick Fix
programme.desc: Alfonso comes to the rescue with quick fixes. P.F. Chang's Home Menu Beef and Broccoli frozen entree makes weeknight meals easy and Chocolate Chip Quaker Chewy Bars are a great snack for kids and adults both.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Simple Goodness
programme.desc: Alfonso covers all things easy from snacks that evoke childhood memories like iconic Hostess Twinkies and the colorful Jel Sert Otter Pops to easy dinner solutions like Bertolli's Chicken Parmigiana and Penne.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Tex-Mex
programme.desc: Roger Mooking travels across America searching for the 12 best Tex-Mex dishes from beans, meats and peppers to salsas and gooey cheeses.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Fried
programme.desc: From seafood and beef to pork and cheese, all the best foods taste better fried and Roger Mooking is scouring the country in search of the 12 best fried-food dishes. He's hanging out with fried-food-loving chefs learning all their secrets.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Cajun Cookouts
programme.desc: Roger heads to the Texas and Louisiana to feast on classic Cajun cooking.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Crazy for Chicken
programme.desc: Roger travels across Massachusetts to meet two chefs who are putting a brand new spin on fire-roasted, rotisserie chicken.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Food Traditions
programme.desc: Roger visits New England for two unique food traditions that celebrate family, friends and the community.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Love for Lobsters in Maine
programme.desc: In Maine, the love for lobsters runs deep and Roger visits two places where lobsters are cooked in the coolest, wood-fired cookers.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ Sandwiches
programme.desc: Roger heads to the Barbecue Exchange for two delicious sandwiches - one is called heaven and the other is called hell. They're both packed with pulled pork and bacon. Then it's off to KayJoe's BBQ in Centreville, Tennessee.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Hamming it Up
programme.desc: Today is about Roger's favorite animal - the pig. He's hamming it up with some of the country's best suppliers or cured, smoked, and aged pork.

programme.title: Good Eats: My Pod
programme.desc: The rare vanilla pod grows on an orchid that can only be pollinated one day a year and contains many flavours and aromas.

programme.title: Good Eats: Coconut Cake Revival
programme.desc: Host Alton Brown wants to know if it's possible to make a great cake with coconut from a can and he's willing to crack open as many nuts as it takes to make a slice of paradise on a plate.

programme.desc: Captain Man and Kid Danger are going to need a little bit of magic and some help from an old friend if they want to catch a thief.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Story Tank
programme.desc: Schwoz uses a machine to get Henry to experience spooky stories when Henry claims he can't be scared.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Snooze Pods/ Sticky Vicky
programme.desc: Jasper becomes trapped in a dream using one of Schwoz's Snooze Pods. Henry's field trip to the Museum of Celebrity Garbage is cut short by the arrival of Sticky Vicky.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Popcorn Monster/ Game of Drones
programme.desc: While trying to create two identical pieces of popcorn, Ray and Henry accidentally bring to life the Popcorn Monster. To help Ray win the Swellview Drone Dash against Dr. Minyak, Schwoz hatches a plan: shrink Kid Danger and have him pilot his own drone.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Clone Babies/ Flying Spiders
programme.desc: Feeling that being Captain Man is too much work for just one person, Ray and Schwoz hatch the perfect plan: clone Ray.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Exchange Student/ Crystal Ball Birthday
programme.desc: When an exchange student comes to visit, he tells a scary story that make the chipmunks think Dave is in danger. Annie and Amber offer to plan Brittany's birthday party, pitting her against Jeanette and Eleanor in the process.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Pack Animal/ The Haunted Getaway
programme.desc: Dave tells Simon to throw out some stuff, and a few of his experiments end up in the wrong hands; Dave and the guys rent a cabin in the woods that might be haunted.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Harl Hubbs Day/ Ann They're Off
programme.desc: It's Harl Hubbs Day and Harl decides to help the whole city, but quickly discovers he wasn't prepared for Harl mania. Billy's mother, Ann, accepts a junkyard race challenge against the city's street racing legend, Tread Octane.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Cubs and Robbers/ Billy the Bug
programme.desc: A movie promotion stunt goes wrong, unleashing a humongous ‘Cubby the Cop’ balloon on the city. Then, Fire Chief McCloud accidently buys a malfunctioning Twirly Hat for her nephew.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Legend of Isla Nublar: To the Extreme!
programme.desc: Danny releases an energy drink into the dinosaurs' water supply, making them extra-energetic and extra dangerous.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Operation Dinkelberg/ Spellementary School
programme.desc: Foop is back and trying to be the most popular kid at school.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Let Sleeper Dogs Lie/ Cat-astrophe
programme.desc: Crocker tries to trigger Sparky with a secret word. Catman confuses Sparky for his old arch-nemesis Dogman.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Longest Fight/ Hypno! Part Deux
programme.desc: The Turtles have a hard time watching their idol skateboard while stopping a burglary. Hypno-Potamus returns and causes havoc at April's homecoming dance.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Late Fee/ Bullhop
programme.desc: The endless craziness of New York complicates the returning of a DVD; the Turtles try to help a distressed mutant.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Stuck on You/ Al Be Back
programme.desc: After an unfortunate “glue” accident, the Turtles have to fight a whole host of villains. The Turtles’ first public musical gig is interrupted by Albearto and his animatronic army.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Dadlantis/ Chloe Rules!
programme.desc: Timmy and Chloe become eco-warriors when they save the underwater city of Atlantis from a dangerous 'sea monster.' Timmy regrets wishing Chloe was the school hall monitor when he sees how seriously she takes the job.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Whittle Me This/ Mayor May Not
programme.desc: Catman thinks Timmy has been kidnapped. He mistakes Chloe for Catgirl and enlists her help to save Timmy.Timmy wishes Dad was Mayor, but Timmy gets tortured by the paparazzi and risks having his fairies discovered.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Shark Objects / Dream Weaver

programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Ambush
programme.desc: A mysterious murder in an upscale community is solved by cell phone forensics.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Barn
programme.desc: When a popular handyman in a New Hampshire town is found murdered investigators follow forensic clues to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: Mom's Deadly Secret
programme.desc: When Colorado soccer mom Paige Birgfeld suddenly vanishes, a small town is left on edge. As cops start to dig for clues, they make a shocking discovery, this devoted mom was living a secret double life.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Paintball
programme.desc: In 1962, the people of the small town of Hanford, California lost their sense of peace when one of their own, 15 year-old Marlene Miller, was murdered. It would take 24 years to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign Here
programme.desc: A young woman walked out of a department store, got into a rental car, and was never seen again. The signature on the rental car agreement turned out to be a forgery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In 1993, two Texas teenagers, a 14-year-old boy and his 13-year-old stepsister, were brutally murdered. It took forensic evidence and a behavioral profile to identify their killer as Jason Massey, who had a history of torturing animals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Prosecutors turned to a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist to solve a missing person's case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Once Bitten
programme.desc: Ray Krone was known throughout Arizona as the snaggletooth killer. An unusual bite-mark on a murdered woman resulted in his conviction and death sentence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Wet
programme.desc: When one woman's drowning death in Pennsylvania triggers another investigation into a woman's eerily similar death in North Carolina, medical examiners must determine if the women drowned or were in fact murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Two of America’s premier pornographers happen to be brothers. When one turns up dead, his brother confesses to shooting him. The question for investigators is whether the shooting was pre-meditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Where the Blood Drops
programme.desc: This is the story of a woman convicted of her husband's murder, whose son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Last Gasp
programme.desc: After a young mom is found brutally murdered in her home, investigators find startling clues on her cell phone that could lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Line of Fire

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: Features an efficient privacy solution to open-office plan distractions with their modern phone booth design. Then, a handy device that helps you easily enjoy all your favourite fast-food condiments on the go.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: First into the Tank are entrepreneurs from Fort Collins, Colorado, who present their fast food franchise focusing only on guilty pleasures. Then, entrepreneurs from Lexington, Kentucky, pitch their high design houses for special nocturnal guests.

programme.title: The Loud House: Tripped!
programme.desc: Everyone in the family has been working hard to save up for a family vacation. But while road tripping to their destination, everything that can go for the family wrong does.

programme.title: The Loud House: ARGGH! You For Real?/ Garage Banned
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde find out that ARGGH! is coming to town and decide to go to the taping. Tired of her siblings, Lori moves to the garage, but quickly finds it's more than she bargained for.

programme.title: The Loud House: Teacher's Union/ Head Poet's Anxiety
programme.desc: To try and make gym class better, Lincoln and Clyde set Coach Pacowski and Mrs. Johnson up. Luan mentors Lucy teaching her how to manage the ups and downs of pursuing a life in the arts.

programme.title: The Loud House: A Grave Mistake/ Leader of the Rack
programme.desc: Lucy and Haiku compete to be the new president of the Young Mortician's Club at school. Leni worries about her friendship with Miguel and Fiona when she's promoted to temporary manager at work.

programme.title: The Loud House: Washed Up/ Lucha Fever With the Casagrandes
programme.desc: The Louds rent a boat for a relaxing day trip on the lake, but the family ends up marooned on a desert island.

programme.title: The Loud House: Good Sports/ Geri-Antics
programme.desc: Lynn finds an unexpected TV sports watching buddy in the family's next-door neighbor, Mr. Grouse. When Lisa realizes that Pop Pop won't be around forever, she turns to science to ensure his longevity.

programme.title: Danger Force: Say My Name
programme.desc: The members of Danger Force are given terrible nicknames live on KLVY news, so they come up with a plan to announce to the world who they really are - Volt, AWOL, ShoutOut, and Brainstorm.

programme.title: All That
programme.desc: PrestonPlayz guest stars to do a video game live stream with Tammy, an unboxing video goes horribly wrong, the loud librarian returns, and a superhero tries being a waitress. Later, watch a performance by Super M.

programme.title: The Substitute: The Bella Twins
programme.desc: WWE Superstar Nikki Bella turns into three quirky characters: a dog trainer-turned-gym teacher, a Bridesmaidzilla, and a clown doubling as a career counselor. Her sister Brie Bella plays puppet master as Nikki goes undercover as The Substitute.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Boating Buddies/ Krabby Kronicle
programme.desc: Squidward is forced to attend Boating School with SpongeBob.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Thumb
programme.desc: Chandler's reunited with his beloved cigarettes, which the rest of his friends can't stand. Monica dates a man all her buddies love but with whom she's bored. And Phoebe can't deal with the fact that her bank gave her one thousand dollars that isn't hers.

programme.title: Friends: The One With George Stephanopoulos
programme.desc: When a pizza guy accidentally delivers a pizza meant for George Stephanopoulos, who lives across the street to the female friends, the women decide to peek at the towel-clad former White House advisor with their binoculars.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the East German Laundry Detergent
programme.desc: Joey wants to get back together with a former girlfriend he dumped, so he tricks Monica into posing as his new gal pal. Ross helps Rachel, a laundry virgin, do her first load of wash. Chandler has a difficult time breaking up with his annoying girlfriend.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Butt
programme.desc: Joey gets his film break when he's hired to be Al Pacino's stunt butt. Chandler has second thoughts about a married woman who wants him to be her sex toy. Monica tries hard to prove to her friends that she really doesn't have an A-type personality.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Blackout
programme.desc: During a blackout, Chandler is trapped with a beautiful model and Rachel meets Paolo.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Nana Dies Twice
programme.desc: Ross and Monica's grandmother dies; Ross falls into an open grave and hurts his back.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Mrs. Bing
programme.desc: Chandler's mother stirs up controversy when she kisses Ross; Rachel tries writing a novel.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Dozen Lasagnas
programme.desc: Monica is stuck with a dozen lasagnas; Paolo hits on Phoebe when he gets a massage.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Boobies
programme.desc: When Chandler sees Rachel half-naked, she tries to get even by catching him in the shower.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Stoned Guy
programme.desc: Ross asks Joey for advice on how to 'talk dirty' to girls. Monica interviews for a chef's position, only the restaurant owner is completely high. Chandler gets a long awaited promotion at his company.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Two Parts
programme.desc: Joey and Chandler meet Phoebe's twin sister Ursula and Joey is instantly smitten with her.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Two Parts
programme.desc: Monica and Rachel pretend to be the other for health insurance purposes.

programme.title: Mom: Spaghetti Sauce and a Dumpster Fire
programme.desc: Christy considers getting a new sponsor after witnessing Marjorie have a major meltdown in a grocery store. Bonnie tries her hand at being a supportive friend.

programme.title: Mom: A Taco Bowl and a Tubby Seamstress
programme.desc: Christy is concerned that she and Bonnie might lose their apartment when Bonnie locks horns with the tough new building owner.

programme.title: Mom: Ocular Fluid and Fighting Robots
programme.desc: Christy's sponsor challenges her to be nice to Bonnie at all costs, and Bonnie is convinced that Adam has stopped making an effort.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Thing/ Hocus Pocus
programme.desc: When Squidward is totally covered in mud, leaves and gunk, the residents of Bikini Bottom think he's some sort of monster coming to terrorize the town. Later, Spongebob gets a brand new magic kit and, after practicing all day, tries to show off.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Blackened Sponge/ Mermaidman vs. Spongebob
programme.desc: SpongeBob punches himself in the face, but tells everyone that he fought off a thug.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Grandpappy the Pirate/ Cephalopod Lodge
programme.desc: With SpongeBob's help, Mr. Krab attempts to fool his granddad into thinking he's a pirate.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Buster Moves/ To Cop or Not to Cop
programme.desc: It's a mad dash by Buster to retrieve his runaway mustache in this fast-paced, zany city-wide chase. Grizzled and Rooky go undercover to root out the criminal mas-termind behind a counterfeit pie operation.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: The Blame Game
programme.desc: Steel learns the concept of discipline and takes it too far, putting one of the Rangers in real danger.

programme.title: The Loud House: Back Out There/ Spell It Out
programme.desc: Clyde, worried that Lincoln is hung up on Ronnie Anne, tries to cure his post-breakup blues.Tired of her siblings walking all over her, Lucy turns to a spell book once to teach her siblings a lesson.

programme.title: Danger Force: Say My Name
programme.desc: The members of Danger Force are given terrible nicknames live on KLVY news, so they come up with a plan to announce to the world who they really are - Volt, AWOL, ShoutOut, and Brainstorm.

programme.title: The Loud House: Legends/ Mall of Duty
programme.desc: Dad and Lincoln get on 'Legends of the Hidden Temple' and are excited for a day of bonding. Lincoln wants to go to the mall and has to bring his sisters along.

programme.title: The Loud House: Kings of the Con
programme.desc: The girls get more attention when accompany Lincoln and Clyde to the Ace Savvy convention dressed as the Full deck.

programme.title: The Loud House: Cooked!
programme.desc: The kids promise to help Dad with the grand opening of his new restaurant by coming up with promotions. But their lack of teamwork and crazy promos lead to an ultimate nightmare in the kitchen for Dad.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Write Stuff/ Racing Hearts
programme.desc: When Lucy quits the writing club at school due to the by-the-books way Huggins runs the club, Mom takes over. When Luna and Sam embark on a challenge taking place across Royal Woods, they discover they have less in common than they thought.

programme.title: The Loud House: Roll Model With the Casagrandes/ No Show With the Casagrandes
programme.desc: When Carl witnesses Ronnie Anne save a dog, he becomes obsessed with being just like his newfound hero. Ronnie Anne secretly starts watching her family's favorite tv show after refusing to watch it with them.

programme.title: The Loud House: City Slickers/ Fool Me Twice
programme.desc: Lori and Lincoln visit the city. Lori struggles to be a city girl and Lincoln finds Ronnie Anne has changed.

programme.title: The Loud House: White Hare/ Insta-Gran
programme.desc: Lincoln has a plan for introducing himself to a new girl, but when the sisters catch him he has to avoid them.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: V.I.Peeved/ Señor Class
programme.desc: When her blog is discovered by a famous musician, Carlota fears her family will embarrass her. Then, when Hector decides to finish his schooling, he become Ronnie Anne and Carl's new classmate.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: How to Train Your Carl/ Stress Test
programme.desc: Carl gets lost in the zoo after sneaking away from his family to find a Komodo dragon. The family tries to help Bobby get over his test taking anxieties.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Flea Market/ Copy Can't
programme.desc: Bobby struggles to give up control of the mercado; Ronnie Anne notices that she's the only person Carlitos won't copy.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Away Game/ Monster Cash
programme.desc: Abuela worries that Ronnie Anne and Bobby will want to live at their dad's new apartment permanently. Carl hosts a haunted tour based on Abuela's tale of 'El Cucuy' and learns that this story may not be fiction.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Snooze You Lose/ Krusty Katering
programme.desc: Squidward is so tired that SpongeBob and Patrick can't wake him up, but they won't let him miss his big audition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Kenny the Cat/ Yeti Crabs
programme.desc: SpongeBob will do anything to get to meet his newest hero, Kenny the Cat.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: My Leg!/ Ink Lemonade
programme.desc: Now that Fred's leg has healed up, SpongeBob is determined to keep it out of harm's way no matter what. Patrick's lemonade stand isn't doing too well until he gets a secret ingredient from Squidward.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Appointment TV/ Karen's Virus
programme.desc: The long-lost episode of Mermaid Man is finally showing on TV, but SpongeBob may not make it home in time to watch. Karen gets a computer virus, and it's up to SpongeBob to get it out of her.

programme.title: World's Wildest Weather: Racing a Wildfire
programme.desc: In Australia, a tourist drives straight into the path of a raging bushfire, unrelenting floods cause thousands of people to flee their homes, and a man sees his life flash before his eyes as he is struck in the head by lightning.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Killer Sea Foam
programme.desc: Killer sea foam, a lake that disappears and reappears, air filled with diamond dust and a snowfall in a Middle Eastern desert are all explained.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Raining Spiders
programme.desc: Lightning creates a storm of spiders, freaky weather turns a beach into a winter wonderland, a "weather-bomb" floods a town with eels, plus toxic algae and "Manhattan Henge" on this episode of Strangest Weather on Earth.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Godzillicle
programme.desc: Examining instances of huge killer icicles, strange blue lights looming above storm clouds, weather systems created by mushrooms and a weird green haze enveloping Moscow.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Rock and a Hard Place
programme.desc: Brandon and Cam rescue a lumber truck tangled in a rock face on Highway 3. Al digs out a buried semi on The Coq. Jamie deals with a tractor fire.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: The Highway Is the Lifeline
programme.desc: Herb's team fights fire wile dealing with a burned-out semi. Mark fights his way through a long back-up during a whiteout to reach a job. A unique recovery crew is up against a load of peat moss and trailer.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Avalanches and Volcanoes
programme.desc: Exploding glaciers, venomous snakes and ground crumbling earthquakes. How to survive being buried alive by a massive avalanche and what do when face-to-face with scorching lava erupting from a volcano is also featured.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Surviving Animal Attacks
programme.desc: Jaw-dropping animal videos show how weather affects moose, wild turkeys and vicious reef sharks. What to do when a 7000-pound whale drags you deep into the ocean and how to respond when a raging buffalo charges is featured.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Tornados and Killer Bees
programme.desc: What do you do when a tornado is about to strike? Could you survive an attack of killer bees? Incredible caught-on-tape moments challenge you with live power lines, dangerous sinkholes, enormous blizzards, massive landslides and vicious sunburns!

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Crash Landing
programme.desc: After thousands of hours of painstaking preparation and dangerous flying, a terrible accident devastates the waterbomber crew in Turkey, and everyone at Buffalo. Wilf's first run as flight attendant raises eyebrows among the staff.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Cold Start
programme.desc: A landing gear collapse right on the runway sends everyone scrambling. Everything goes wrong trying to get a frozen DC4 airborne.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Shoot-Out
programme.desc: A sketchy landing gear light puts David and Jeff on the spot on the final approach to a far north airstrip.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Gear Lock
programme.desc: Devan runs into gear problems when he ferries a mothballed DC3 across the country and a cold snap triggers problems at Buffalo.

programme.title: AMHQ Weekend
programme.desc: The science and stories of weather, plus in-depth forecasts with a focus on weekend weather.

programme.title: Weekend Recharge
programme.desc: The latest news and weather to prepare for the weekend.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter: Deadliest Mudslide
programme.desc: A mudslide in Washington State, triggered by heavy rainfall, rips through a hillside community, killing 43 people.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter: Texas Flash Flood
programme.desc: A flash flood in the Texas Hill Country kills 13 people and destroys 350 homes. A father watches helplessly as his house is pulled down the river, and his wife and two children are tossed into the current.

programme.title: Top Ten Record Setters
programme.desc: Mother Nature shows us amazing weather on a daily basis. But sometimes it can get out of control. From the strongest hurricane to extreme weather swings, here are the Top Ten record setting storms.

programme.title: Top Ten Amazing Moments
programme.desc: For more than thirty years, our meteorologists have battled the wildest weather on the planet. They've taken you along for the ride and in the heart of the storm, their reports have kept you informed. We look at ten amazing moments in weather reporting.

programme.title: Hoarders: Eileen/ Judy
programme.desc: Eileen has destroyed her 3,200 sq. ft. home, and her relationships with her husband and six sons. Judy has blown most of her $1 million inheritance on her hoard, and has lost $30,000 worth of checks in her hoarded house.

programme.title: Hoarders: Norman/ Linda
programme.desc: Paramedics rushing to save a woman's life lose precious time when they're forced to climb over the hoard in Norman's house. Since Linda's husband died 10 years ago, she's been adding to a hoard that has now spiralled out of control.

programme.title: Hoarders: Joanne/ Kristy
programme.desc: The trauma of dealing with Joanne's hoarding was so bad for her daughter that she developed post-traumatic stress disorder. After experiencing the horror of assault, Kristi began shopping to escape her pain.

programme.title: Hoarders: Verna/ Joanne
programme.desc: When Verna is hospitalized, the hospital refuses to let her return home unless it's cleaned up. Joanne's house has gone from immaculate showplace to garbage pit.

programme.title: Hoarders: Debra and Patty
programme.desc: Debra has filled her house with a ton of clothes and run up a $50,000 credit card debt. Patty has stuffed her house with so many floor-to-ceiling cardboard boxes that she's had to move to her son's place.

programme.title: Hoarders: Shanna and Lynda
programme.desc: Shanna owns the worst hoard in 'Hoarders' history - a house crammed floor to ceiling with bottles filled with human waste. Meanwhile, Lynda is hoarding stuff for the Armageddon.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: Watch as a carjacking spree ends in a tasing, a donkey is found in the middle of the highway and a chaotic chase through Cleveland leads to multiple PIT maneuvers.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: Montana Highway Patrol pursue an active shooter, three suspects run when an officer in Tulsa pulls them over and an officer in Ohio uses Narcan to save a man experiencing an overdose.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: Tulsa PD uses their K9 officers to nab a fleeing suspect. Pasco County deputies are first to arrive on the scene of a house fire. Volusia Sheriff's Air One helps deputies track down suspects after a long pursuit.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: Florida deputies and K9 officers track down carjackers. West Memphis police in a high-speed pursuit of an armed shoplifting suspect. Police and deputies respond to a report of a burglary in progress at a home in Oregon.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: Oklahoma officers respond to the scene of a multi car accident while Lee County deputies in Iowa taser a man wielding a knife. Plus, Officers in Wisconsin chase a stolen donut truck.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: An Albuquerque Police pursuit leads to a stand-off with two suspects. Then, officers work to rescue three women and a dog trapped in a flash flood in Texas. An Ohio officer responds to a fawn trapped in a family's backyard.

programme.title: Movie: Hitman
programme.desc: A hitman gets caught up in a political conspiracy where he is pursued by both Interpol and the Russian military.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Fighting Back the Tears
programme.desc: Gym-loving ladies power through the pain while bartending besties try to knock back the heat. The fight for $25,000 is not easy. Friendships will strain, people will cry, and stomachs will be destroyed in the pepperdome.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Beware the Bucket
programme.desc: Two teams of best friends enter the Pepperdome with confidence, but Chef Willie's demonic sauces bring them down hard and early.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Worst. Hot Sauce. Ever
programme.desc: Two comic book guys go against two twerkin' besties. The 'Constrictor Sauce' knocks the comic book guys to their knees, but the keep fighting for the prize.

programme.title: Hot Ones: John Mayer
programme.desc: John Mayer takes on the wings of death and everything else along the way, including Justin Bieber's melody wizardry and the best guitar faces in history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bad Carma
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q showcase questionable products to participants, and then rescue strangers who don't need to be rescued. Later, the big loser must hit and run his mouth to get himself out of trouble.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Shame of Water
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Murr and Sal find scandalous diary entries written by their 'daughters', and then break up with significant others in front of strangers. The loser will find himself in hot water and on shaky ground while waiting tables.

programme.title: Movie: Knocked Up
programme.desc: When a fun-loving guy impregnates an up-and-coming entertainment journalist, they put their differences aside and take a shot at love.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Payday
programme.desc: As Eddie prepares to become a dad, the rest of the crew's wagering is out of control, forcing Terry to ban gambling. The crew finds creative ways to bet behind Chief's back, causing Lucy to fall into a hole of debt she can't climb out from.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Old Flame
programme.desc: Eddie runs into his cradle-robbing first love and must decide whether to rekindle his romance with the sexy senior citizen. Then, Granny and Lucy compete to win the affections of an androgynous dispatcher and Terry discovers moisturizer.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: TKOMG
programme.desc: Cocky sisters challenge best bros in the Pepperdome. However, the sauce proves too hot to handle for one team, resulting in the first TKO.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Fighting Back the Tears
programme.desc: Gym-loving ladies power through the pain while bartending besties try to knock back the heat. The fight for $25,000 is not easy. Friendships will strain, people will cry, and stomachs will be destroyed in the pepperdome.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: It's all play and no work when the guys square off in a toy-pitching competition. And tonight's big loser has to quiet down patrons in a food court.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: The Show Got Cancelled
programme.desc: Find out why Amir K would suck as a realtor, how Brad Williams gets Amish people to worship him, and how Mark Normand nearly gets the show cancelled.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: America's Least Wanted
programme.desc: Michelle Buteau knows exactly what millennials say, Cipha Sounds has a surprising favorite dance move, and Shane Torres explains what makes Cipha different from other DJs.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: What Is Woke?
programme.desc: Thomas Dale puts a spell on Damien, Ali Kolbert knows what Thomas does to relax, and Matthew Broussard reveals Ali's favorite board game.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: This is My Art, Dad!
programme.desc: Dulce Sloan illustrates the benefits of twerking at zero gravity, Dave Hill becomes the number one all-time CKO crowd high-fiver, and Casey James Salengo says he'll get even with both of them.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: An Elevated Ferret Alert
programme.desc: Find out which trick made it hard for Michael to walk the next day, what trick was added at the last minute after a prop broke and what animal Michael fosters during shoots.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: A Faux Pas to Wear
programme.desc: Why Michael says "shenanigans" during some tricks, his favorite trick of all time and why the crew had to shut down production for an hour.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Skull With a Flower Hat
programme.desc: The trick that nearly burned Michaels face, who he gets in prank wars with on-set, and which trick did he created a prop for.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Might Be Trippin'
programme.desc: Find out which trick nearly wounded a delivery man, what illusion is difficult for even skilled magicians to pull off and why fans speculated the show was connected to the illuminati.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Sitcom
programme.desc: Adam tackles classic television stereotypes, from the racism behind public pools, to the 'model minority' myth of Asian Americans, to the on-screen toxic masculinity that's masking the problems young men face today.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Games
programme.desc: Adam hits pause on the myth that connects video games to real-life violence, and reveals that Monopoly was a rip-off of an anti-capitalist teaching game. Plus, Olympic organizers get rich while athletes struggle to get by.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Cops
programme.desc: Adam looks at the truth behind the overuse of SWAT Teams, illustrates how using school officers can create a pipeline for prisons, and examines the origins and intended purpose of police officers.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Himself
programme.desc: In the season finale, Adam battles with his inner self-doubt over how biases affect the show. He then explores the shortcomings of storytelling and the influence (or lack thereof) of advertising on the integrity of the series.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Thrillseekers 2
programme.desc: Stars offer hilarious commentaries while viewing footage of the world's dumbest people.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performers 9
programme.desc: Brawling dancers, a bassist who fails at crowd-surfing, a rapper who's more of a cougher and some very creepy furniture store commercials.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performer 11
programme.desc: A rapper whose balance is worse than his rhymes, a flaming embarrassment of a TV chef, a dancer who lost her sexy a long time ago and a weather man with serious arachnophobia.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performers 12
programme.desc: Butter-fingered figure-skaters, busted-ass break dancers, klutzy beauty pageant contestants and comedians who are only funny because they're so not funny.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Drawing a Blank
programme.desc: Find out what classic bit began in this early episode, which Jokers used to live together, and why filming in Times Square became a bad idea.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Supercuts
programme.desc: Find out which entrepreneur sparked a Jokers fashion debate, when Joe first starting 'nosing' people and which challenge was originally filmed for the pilot episode.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Art Attack
programme.desc: Find out why hair dryers are banned from the set, what moment has become a fan and crew classic, and how Murr's blankie wound up on the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Alliance
programme.desc: Find out which Joker is an avid photographer, and what words the guys never want to hear before filming a punishment. Plus, learn which Joker is never afraid to strip down for a challenge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Trackside Live!
programme.desc: Taking viewers to the best racetracks across America for great racing action. TVG's exclusive tracks are highlighted in addition to expert analysis and information provided by hosts and analysts live from the track and our Los Angeles studios.

programme.title: Book TV
programme.desc: A focus on non-fiction books, authors and the publishing industry, offering viewers a forum to hear from their favourite authors.

programme.title: Book TV: Presidential Leadership in Crisis
programme.desc: U.S. News & World Report's Kenneth Walsh looks at how different Presidents have handled crisis, from Franklin D. Roosevelt to today.

programme.title: After Words: Front Row at the Trump Show
programme.desc: ABC News' Chief White House Correspondent Jonathan Karl provides a behind the scenes look at President Trump's administration. He's interviewed by Mike McCurry, former White House Press Secretary in the Clinton Administration.

programme.title: Book TV
programme.desc: A focus on non-fiction books, authors and the publishing industry, offering viewers a forum to hear from their favourite authors.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades of Grey
programme.desc: A literature student falls for a wealthy young entrepreneur, who makes clear that any relations between the two of them will be on his own terms. She soon comes to learn of his singular tastes and his need to be completely in control.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades Darker
programme.desc: Christian approaches Ana and asks her to give him a second chance. She agrees with one condition: this time, there isn't going to be any rules or punishments. They start to build trust, but figures from Christian's past threaten to tear them apart.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades Freed
programme.desc: Ana Steel and Christian Grey's fledgling marriage is threatened by jealously when his former lover works her way back into his life, but lurking beyond that is an even greater threat in the form of Ana's disgraced former employer who's out for revenge.

programme.title: Girlfriends' Guide to Divorce: Rule #58: Avoid the Douchemobile
programme.desc: Abby chooses between boyfriend Will and husband Jake as she gets offered a job working for SheShe, a popular online magazine as their 'Face of Divorce'. At SheShe, she faces opposition from Barbara, a rival editor.

programme.title: Girlfriends' Guide to Divorce: Rule #77: Don't Blow the Bubble
programme.desc: Abby and Jake try and keep their secret relationship hidden while her managing editor Barbara at SheShe pushes her to go out on dates to drive attention to her new blog.

programme.title: Girlfriends' Guide to Divorce: Rule #8: Timing is Everything
programme.desc: Abby goes on a date with TV celebrity Dr. Harris to increase traffic to her new blog and please Barbara. Jake decides to tell Abby a secret he's been keeping from her. Jo starts to Tinder date. Phoebe throws Delia an engagement party.

programme.title: Girlfriends' Guide to Divorce: Rule #605: You Can Go Home Again
programme.desc: Abby and Jake decide to finally define their relationship status by spending a weekend at home without work, friends, and the kids. Meanwhile, Phoebe reconnects with friends from her modeling days, and Delia and fiancé Gordon go house hunting.

programme.title: Girlfriends' Guide to Divorce: Rule #25: Beware the Second Chance
programme.desc: Abby goes to New York City to sell her book to publishers and is surprised to run into Dr. Harris at the same literary convention. Becca tells Jake that TMZ knows about her pregnancy and is about to go public with the news.

programme.title: Girlfriends' Guide to Divorce: Rule #14: No Means... No
programme.desc: Abby's parents come to town and make a very unusual request just as Jake is about to leave for Latvia. At the begging of her daughter, Abby reaches out to Becca to have a meeting.

programme.title: Girlfriends' Guide to Divorce: Rule #79: Labels are for Canned Goods
programme.desc: Abby and Barbara head to SplitCon, a convention dedicated to providing services for people who are breaking or broken up. Phoebe gets introduced into the L.A. art scene by new beau Joaquin.

programme.title: Girlfriends' Guide to Divorce: Rule #81: There's No Crying in Porn
programme.desc: Abby wants to define her relationship with Dr. Harris but he isn't ready yet. Abby reconnects with escort Carl in Los Angeles. Delia finds out who sent the photos of her and Albert. Phoebe is intrigued by new artist JD's creative process.

programme.title: Girlfriends' Guide to Divorce: Rule #36: If You Can't Stand the Heat, You're Cooked
programme.desc: As a heat wave overtakes L.A., Abby is told by her editor, Kat, that her book is in need of a major overhaul. Abby decides that she is going to put Dr. Harris to the "boyfriend" test and invites him over to meet her friends and kids.

programme.title: Girlfriends' Guide to Divorce: Rule #118: Let Her Eat Cake
programme.desc: After collapsing after the birth of Becca's baby, Abby is ordered by her doctor to stay at home and eat and rest. The girlfriends decide to throw Delia a surprise bachelorette party at an upscale male strip club, a treat from Barbara.

programme.title: Girlfriends' Guide to Divorce: Rule #876: Everything Does NOT Happen For a Reason
programme.desc: It's Delia's wedding day. After betraying Delia and revealing her affair to the girlfriends, Abby has been uninvited to the big day. With her deadline looming, Abby focuses her energies on finishing her book.

programme.title: Girlfriends' Guide to Divorce: Rule #59: 'Happily Ever After' Is an Oxymoron
programme.desc: Abby and the girlfriends help Delia cope after the fallout of Gordon's news. Jake returns from Latvia with a secret to tell Abby. Jo has to finally face her feelings about Scott. Phoebe makes a surprise announcement.

programme.title: Movie: Coyote Ugly
programme.desc: A shy aspiring songwriter comes out of her shell while working at a popular New York bar.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades of Grey
programme.desc: A literature student falls for a wealthy young entrepreneur, who makes clear that any relations between the two of them will be on his own terms. She soon comes to learn of his singular tastes and his need to be completely in control.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Surf 'n' Turf Jackpot
programme.desc: Guy hits the surf 'n' turf jackpot in Mississippi and Oahu. He tries some tasty ribs, fritters as well as pork rinds.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Peppers, Pork and Poutine
programme.desc: This trip, triple "D" goes triple "P" with some standout veggie and meat dishes. In Phoenix, the tattooed, trained chef is putting her spin on chilies and a regional pork dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Goin' the Extra Mile
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's headin' to some joints going all-in on some classic comfort foods. In Chicago, the burger joint with Asian flare proudly serves all things umami. In Memphis, a high-end chef takes low-down Southern staples to a whole new level.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fully Focused
programme.desc: Guy visits restaurants in Syracuse and Nags Head that have a definite direction.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Servin' Up San Francisco
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's cruising the San Francisco coast for a diverse culinary road trip. First, Guy swings by the repurposed garage in the Mission District for some southern hospitality.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: International Intrigue
programme.desc: Guy grabs some Thai noodles, curry and green papaya salad in Dallas. In Miami he visits a Lating place for empanadas and a unique plantain sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A World of Barbecue
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's firing up an entire world of barbecue on this trip. In Wilmington, a righteous spot is smokin' up chicken salad and off-the-chain chili.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Unique Eats
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri is grabbin' some unique eats. First, in Santa Fe, N.M., a not-your-everyday Indian spot servin' up favorites like dosas and lamb curry. Then, a deli in Reno, Nev.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Savory Seafood and Square Pie
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's thinking outside the box. First up, he and his son, Hunter, check on an Italian spot in Boston dishing out double portions of their authentic eats.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Off the Beaten Path
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's taking a detour to find some not-your-everyday eats. In Richmond, Va., a jammin' Jamaican joint serving outrageous oxtail and fried chicken with true island flavour.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Northern Southern
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is grabbing Southern flavour without ever hittin' the South. In Cambridge, Mass., a funky joint fryin' up Nashville hot chicken and cookin' up gangster gumbo. A smokin' spot in Sparks, Nev.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Spinning the Globe
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's checking out joints putting their own spin on global flavour. In Kauai, Hawaii, a culinary dojo ampin' up local specialties like saimin and chile pepper chicken. An outrageous twist on tacos and burritos in Kansas City, Mo.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Wonder Women
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's visiting an all-female lineup that's rockin' the house. In Houston, a grandma's firing up family recipes like homemade tamales and chile rellenos with a twist. In Orlando, Florida, a funky spot is focused on making meatball masterpieces.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Swiss, Sandwiches and Sausage
programme.desc: In Portland, Oregon, a standout spot servin' up specialties straight out of Switzerland. In Charlotte, North Carolina, a funky food truck dishing out grilled cheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Savory Seafood and Square Pie
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's thinking outside the box. First up, he and his son, Hunter, check on an Italian spot in Boston dishing out double portions of their authentic eats.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Farm Stand
programme.desc: Ina Garten lifts the veil on all her tips, sharing techniques and incredible elegant and easy recipes.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Get Your Fit On
programme.desc: Starting the day right is a spicy turkey merguez scramble, roasted chickpeas and avocado, followed by a tasty take on peanut butter and jelly cream of wheat.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Healthy And Easy
programme.desc: After indulging in rich food on the road, Guy Fieri invites his chef friends to the ranch to balance things out with healthy dishes that don't sacrifice flavor. Rocco DiSpirito makes an incredibly juicy but lean straight-up cheeseburger.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Mighty Neighborly Of You
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli preps a special meal to take to her neighbors to thank them for all the times they've taken care of her dog, picked up her mail and brought in packages. She whips up lamb shepherd's pie and arugula salad with pickled red onions.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Burning 101
programme.desc: Ladd's out burning the pastures and Ree Drummond has some hungry mouths to feed! She takes care of two days' worth of dinners with Spicy Jerk Chicken and Steak and Bean Burritos, along with a crunchy Corn Salad.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Good Ol' Days
programme.desc: While Ree's husband, Ladd, and his father, Chuck, dismantle a historic old cattle feed storehouse on the ranch, she cooks them a lunch of juicy Steak and Eggs Benedict piled high onto Garlic Butter English Muffins.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Done And Dusted
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is getting ready for two busy days by preparing a variety of make-ahead marvels! For day one, she's making maple sausage breakfast burritos for the guys to eat at a big cattle working and a cobb-wedge salad kit with Thousand Island dressing.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Cowboys Who Lunch
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is delivering a tailgate lunch to her husband, Ladd, and the cowboys who are out working cattle. She makes Pressure Cooker Pulled Pork Sandwiches and Pickled Jalapenos and Onions for topping them.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Spring Is Springing!
programme.desc: Molly Yeh creates a springtime feast to celebrate planting season on the farm. The meal includes her juicy one-skillet chicken with spring vegetables, crispy dill flakey bread, and a nutty walnut romesco sauce for dunking.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Outdoor Movie Night
programme.desc: Molly Yeh makes some of her favorite munchies for an outdoor movie night on the farm. Her Nachos are piled high with BBQ Pulled Pork, and Radishes with Smoked Butter are a unique, crunchy combination. She assembles individual Candy Bar Salads for dessert.

programme.title: In the Kitchen With Joanna Gaines
programme.desc: In this one-hour special, Joanna Gaines brings us into her kitchen as she makes family favourites -- zucchini bread, chocolate chip cookies to name a few. Stick around for a preview of her new cooking show, which will premiere on Magnolia Network.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: The Big Till
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is making an easy and hearty lunch for the Hagen family farmers, and she's using some of her favorite pantry staples- with a twist.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Midwest Mex
programme.desc: To celebrate her husband Nick's birthday, Molly Yeh surprises him by making his favourite Mexican cuisine- with a Midwestern twist of course! She cooks up a taco hotdish, chili-lime fruit salad and ham and cheese jalapeno poppers.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Fried Feud
programme.desc: It's nothing but fried fun when four chefs are challenged with making dishes full of fried fair food. They will have to follow a bizarre grocery list for the first challenge before getting a skimpy budget to make fried chicken for the next challenge.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: America's Next Chefs
programme.desc: Guy Fieri puts four up-and-coming chefs to the ultimate Flavortown test to crown America's Next Chef. First, Guy has the chefs flip the ingredients from an old-fashioned Waldorf salad into a modern dish.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Guy's Trivia Games
programme.desc: Guy Fieri goes wild combining his brand of food trivia with his favorite culinary games. The four competitors are out to prove that they're great chefs who also know a lot about food.

programme.title: Total DramaRama: The Bad Guy Busters
programme.desc: Izzy wants to play a superhero game and is willing to do whatever it takes to get the others to see it through.

programme.title: Total DramaRama: Cuttin' Corners
programme.desc: Duncan, Leshawna and Jude go to extreme lengths to get a corn piece of Izzy's birthday cake.

programme.title: Total DramaRama: Cone in 60 Seconds
programme.desc: After Owen gets ripped off at the ice cream truck, the kids unite to right that wrong.

programme.title: Total DramaRama: Free Chili
programme.desc: After Owen puts a walkie talkie inside his chili dog, Harold gets the idea that it's actually an alien.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Dream/ The Sidekick
programme.desc: Gumball blames Darwin for kissing Penny in his dream which threatens their friendship.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Limit/ The Game
programme.desc: Nicole becomes enraged at the grocery store when the kids won't stop asking for candy. The family must complete a game of Dodj or Daar to the end, or else.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Promise/ The Voice
programme.desc: After getting a threatening message of Elmore Plus, Gumball and Darwin go apologize to everyone they know. Darwin gets in trouble when he makes conflicting promises to Gumball and Banana Joe.

programme.title: Apple & Onion: Rotten Apple
programme.desc: Apple and Onion try to fit in to life in the big city.

programme.title: Apple & Onion: The Inbetween
programme.desc: Apple and Onion try to fit in to life in the big city.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Z Kai: No Victory for Android 19/ Enter Super Vegeta
programme.desc: Vegeta's sudden arrival creates an opening for the others to rescue Goku. While Yamcha rushes the fallen hero to safety, Vegeta reveals his new and improved fighting style.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Z Kai: Piccolo's Assault! Android 20 and the Twisted Future
programme.desc: As Goku wages a life and death battle with a deadly heart condition, Piccolo and others band together to try to defeat the powerful Android 20.

programme.title: American Dad!: One Little Word
programme.desc: Stan feels that he can't say 'no' to any of his boss' outrageous personal requests. When Francine gets roped into the annoying ordeal and her romantic getaway is ruined, she lays down the law and forces Stan to stand his ground.

programme.title: American Dad!: Roy Rogers McFreely
programme.desc: When Stan forgets to pick up grenadine at the grocery store, Roger goes ballistic and vows to get him back by taking over a project close to his heart: the Homeowner's Association.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: The Wolf of Wharf Street
programme.desc: On Halloween night, Linda tries to impress the kids by taking them to look for a wolf that has been terrorizing the town. Meanwhile, an injured and medicated Bob believes that Teddy has turned into a werewolf.

programme.title: Family Guy: The Tan Aquatic With Steve Zissou
programme.desc: When a bully begins to harass Chris, Peter goes to his defence, but the kid is so annoying that Peter beats him up. Peter then realizes that bullying is fun and begins beating up everyone in the house.

programme.title: Family Guy: Airport '07
programme.desc: Peter takes Quagmire to the airport for work and messes things up, causing Quagmire to lose his job as a pilot. Peter and Cleveland devise a plan to help Quagmire get his old job back when plans to find another job fail miserably.

programme.title: My Hero Academia: Prepping for the School Festival Is the Funnest Part
programme.desc: Class 1-A is still trying to figure out what they want to do for the school festival, and Midoriya and Togata visit Erin in the hospital.
