programme.title: The Zoo: Giraffe in the City
programme.desc: A sweet giraffe named Mashengo journeys from the Indiana Zoo to his new home in the Bronx. Keepers hand-raise endangered ducklings and release them onto the duck pond at the Central Park Children's Zoo. Plus, love is in the air for a pair of cloud rats.

programme.title: The Zoo: Grumpy Cats' New Digs
programme.desc: Iray, a red ruffed lemur, is rushed to the health center when keepers discover a wound on his leg. A new exhibit is built for the Pallas's cats, the original grumpy cats. Plus, seven adorable baby turtles join the zoo's colony of an endangered species.

programme.title: The Zoo: Mending Willow
programme.desc: One team tests the problem solving skills of lions against those of snow leopards. Willow, a young red panda, is having mysterious foot problems. Also, the bird department anxiously awaits the gender reveal of two new adjutant stork chicks.

programme.title: The Zoo: Snow Monkey Social
programme.desc: A new bison calf has a hard time keeping up with his mom. The bird department prepares a group of Von der Decken hornbill chicks for their big move to the Minnesota Zoo. And keepers at the Central Park Zoo hope the female snow monkeys accept a new male.

programme.title: The Zoo: A New Beginning
programme.desc: Max the camel faces new challenges as he ages. The zoo prepares to give an injured turkey vulture a permanent home, but after healing, there may be a change of plan. Willow the red panda gives birth to two baby cubs.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Great Turtle Comeback
programme.desc: A charismatic ostrich named Olga works to be reunited with her flock. Buster the squirrel monkey is introduced to the zoo's troop of feisty females. A functionally extinct species of turtle finds new life, and everyone's favorite warthog is back.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Marvelous Mott Mott
programme.desc: Max, a beloved camel, develops a large abscess on the top of his head. An adorable marmot prepares for her first classroom visit as an ambassador animal. Later, a peregrine falcon found at the base of skyscraper is bought to the zoo for a health check.

programme.desc: In this episode we climb high into the world's great mountain ranges. Only a few pioneering animals have what it takes to survive up here, they are amongst the most elusive and mysterious on the planet.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Jungles
programme.desc: Jungles are the richest places on Earth. A magical world of surprise, drama and unforgettable wild characters. From the jungles of Brazil to Costa Rica, watch as the animals face life in the most competitive place on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Deserts
programme.desc: In this episode we visit the world's deserts, a land of extremes that pushes life to the limit. Animals here have developed ingenious ways of dealing with the hostile conditions giving rise to the most incredible survival stories on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Grasslands
programme.desc: Grasslands cover one quarter of all land and support the greatest gatherings of wildlife on Earth. The extraordinary creatures that live here must survive the most hostile seasons on the planet.

programme.title: Life Story: First Steps
programme.desc: Each and every animal is born with a chance to survive, thrive and produce their very own next generation. The first hurdle in life is infancy.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Islands
programme.desc: For some, remote islands offer sanctuary away from the mainland: the tiny pygmy three-toed sloth only survives because of the peace and safety offered by its Caribbean island home, while seabirds like albatross thrive in predator-free isolation.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Cities
programme.desc: Rooted on the slope of a rocky hill in Namaqualand, South Africa stands The Namaqua Rock Fig Tree. with the ability to withstand the unforgiving conditions of the surrounding desolate landscape, and with minimal rainfall, it is a testament to survival.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Serengeti
programme.desc: Take a peek at one of the most famous habitats on Earth the Serengeti. This vast grassland is home to some of the greatest concentrations of herbivores in Africa.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Making Worlds
programme.desc: Steve Backshall reveals the incredible influence that insects and their close relatives have on our planet's many ecosystems. In South America, the landscape has been created almost solely by one team of insects: grass-cutter ants.

programme.title: Weird Wonders
programme.desc: A stork travels 13,000 kilometers each year to rendezvous with his flightless mate, and a herd of dead reindeer cause suspicion in Norway.

programme.title: Weird Wonders
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes an annual gathering of critically endangered Saiga antelope, and mysterious cloud formations take over the internet.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 1
programme.desc: After managing to escape the lethal Hunger Games arena not once but twice, Katniss Everdeen shelters in the hidden District 13 while the people she love remain under threat from the Capitol. With the help of her friends, she prepares to save Peeta.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 2
programme.desc: The story comes to a close as Katniss and the unit from District 13 prepare to take down President Snow once and for all. With the nation in a full-scale war, Katniss will be tested as never before as she fights for the very future of Panem.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: In the future, the Capitol selects a boy and a girl from the twelve districts to fight to the death on television. Katniss volunteers to take her sister's place for the latest match.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers: Deep Woods Standoff
programme.desc: Trooper Noll responds to a domestic disturbance call and negotiates with the man. Meanwhile, Trooper Cooper pulls over an intoxicated muscle-head who was reported to have been doing 'donuts' in the middle of the road.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers: Guns, Cash and Coke
programme.desc: Troopers chase a wanted and dangerous man through a forest after he crashes his car into a hotel at 100 miles per hour, injuring three people.

programme.title: Drugs, Inc.: Heroin Island, NYC
programme.desc: Heroin use on Staten Island is reaching epic proportions as young users leave prescription pills for dope.

programme.title: Drugs, Inc.: Crack
programme.desc: From the slums of South America to the mean streets of Chicago and Miami, crack cocaine is a drug dealer's dream: a cheap, short, intense high that leaves users desperate for more and fuels crime and violence like no other drug on the planet.

programme.title: Drugs, Inc.: Ecstasy
programme.desc: Ecstasy is the most controversial illicit drug on the planet: to clubbers it's the ultimate love drug, yet thousands of ravers have died from taking it; meanwhile to underground therapists it's a life-saving medicine.

programme.title: Drugs, Inc.: Crack
programme.desc: From the slums of South America to the mean streets of Chicago and Miami, crack cocaine is a drug dealer's dream: a cheap, short, intense high that leaves users desperate for more and fuels crime and violence like no other drug on the planet.

programme.title: Drugs, Inc.: San Francisco Meth Zombies
programme.desc: The 1960s psychedelic revolution put San Francisco, California at the epicentre, making drugs the new norm. But now, the city, especially the gay community, is struggling to recover from a meth epidemic.

programme.title: Drugs, Inc.: Miami Vices
programme.desc: Over four decades, Miami has played an integral role in trafficking drugs from Latin America into the United States, which has left the city with an insatiable narcotics appetite.

programme.title: Drugs, Inc.: Hawaiian Ice
programme.desc: In Hawaii, which has one of the highest rates of crystal meth users in the nation, National Geographic cameras follow along on a raid to a drug trafficker's house.

programme.title: Drugs, Inc.: Philly Dope
programme.desc: In Kensington, north Philadelphia, heroin, crack cocaine and PCP are dealt from a hundred different corners. Abandoned homes and factories serve as crash pads, shooting galleries, dope holes and stash houses.

programme.title: Drugs, Inc.: PCP in DC
programme.desc: Washington D.C. was once 'Crack City' and the murder capital of the U.S. But an increased police presence following September 11 made drugs scarce. In the neighbourhoods of southeast D.C., one drug remained - PCP.

programme.title: The Atlanta Child Murders: Into the Woods
programme.desc: From 1979 to 1981, a string of murders of black children are terrorizing the city of Atlanta, igniting terror and frustration from a community that feels increasingly neglected.

programme.title: The Atlanta Child Murders: The Devil's Work
programme.desc: As the weeks pass, young black males are killed with horrifying frequency. An inventive tactic finally gives law enforcement their first real lead with suspect Wayne Williams, but they lack evidence for an arrest.

programme.title: The Atlanta Child Murders: The Requiem
programme.desc: After an intense investigation, Wayne Williams goes on trial for one of the most notorious murder cases in Atlanta's history. The public struggles with the question of Williams's guilt.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Friend or Foe

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Roses are Red, Murder is Too
programme.desc: When a town counsel member is found murdered in her home, residents of Berryville, Virginia are appalled. With the only evidence being the single bullet that took her life, the slaying begins to look more and more like a professional hit.

programme.title: Diabolical: Accident Waiting to Happen
programme.desc: Rainey Morin is a single mom who's finally found her soulmate. Robert Kowalski treats Rainey like a queen and her kids like gold, but beneath his bright veneer is a dark history threatening to wreak havoc.

programme.title: Diabolical: Living Off the Dead
programme.desc: George Kalomeris is a family man who looks after the less fortunate in his community. But after a dying man fingers George as the gunman, police discovera monster more diabolical than anyone could ever imagine possible. ...and he's not acting alone.

programme.title: Diabolical: Family or Foe
programme.desc: A young family in La Mirada, CA is out for an evening stroll when terror strikes. For investigation nothing seems to add up. Is it random violence or a mastermind at work? The truth will take years to emerge.

programme.title: Diabolical: Daddy's Little Nightmare
programme.desc: In 2017, Federal Heights, Colorado is filled with fear when 69-year-old veteran Bill Mussack is reported missing gone without a trace. Police act fast to uncover a diabolical killer with a heinous plot, before this malicious murderer strikes again.

programme.title: Diabolical: Hands That Rob the Cradle
programme.desc: In early 1980, two eerily similar crimes occur 400 miles apart. They both leave young mother dead and an infant child stolen. Years later, police unravel a plot so cold-blooded, it leaves everyone even seasoned homicide detectives in utter shock.

programme.title: Diabolical: Masking Evil
programme.desc: A burning car is found by the side of a highway on the same night a single mother of two is reported missing. These two events are connected, and connecting the dots will lead investigators to a notorious criminal who has been hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: No Remorse
programme.desc: Robin Sowders is brutally beaten in his home in Bloomington, Indiana and later dies from his injuries. When his wife turns up at the police station, the investigation turns on its head. Only a wiretap will eventually reveal the truth.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Buried at the Ranch
programme.desc: In Arlington, Texas, Michael Humphreys and Sandra Walton are brutally gunned down. Detectives don't know who the intended victim was but when they discover recordings of phone conversations with one of the victims, they get the break they need.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Evil in South Texas
programme.desc: Billy Staton and his fiancé Leticia Castro vanish without a trace. Have they left town and eloped? The discovery of Billy's burnt out car and a shock confession, reveal a web of lies that only a secret recording can untangle the truth.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Message From the Grave
programme.desc: Michelle Despinasse is shot inside her own home in Nanuet, New York. She is rushed to hospital but succumbs to her injuries. Investigators discover that in her final moments, Michelle made a secret recording that will reveal her killer's identity.

programme.title: Body Cam: Hunted
programme.desc: In Texas police set a trap for a would-be killer. Officers put a plan into action, and Body Cam reveals a deadly plot. In Florida, a high-speed chase leads police into a dangerous swamp. But when a K9 locates the suspect, the arrest turns into a rescue.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Mafia vs. JFK
programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroys his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: The Last Don
programme.desc: Joe Massino, the 'Last Don', crushes anyone who goes against the mafia code of omerta. Loyalty to his family, and obedience to their code of silence, is everything. But when the Feds take Massino down, Massino takes everyone down with him.

programme.title: Bugsy Siegel: Godfather of Vegas
programme.desc: Bugsy Siegel, the Jewish gangster with charm and a killer's instinct, plays hard and dreams big. He's got a vision to build a gambling mecca in the Nevada desert; but when he stops playing by the Mafia's rules, Bugsy pays the ultimate price.

programme.title: The Mafia's Black Sheep
programme.desc: In the lawless days of Prohibition America one gangster stands out as the black sheep Dutch Schultz. When Dutch threatens to kill a state prosecutor the mob can't risk the fallout.

programme.title: The Mafia Kingpin
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and the the model for running crime business.

programme.title: Bugsy Siegel: Godfather of Vegas

programme.title: Weaponology: Rangers
programme.desc: US Army Rangers are the men of steel forged in the fire of every major conflict from the beaches of D-Day to the streets of Baghdad. Weaponology takes you through time to show how the Rangers always ride the cutting edge of military technology.

programme.title: Weaponology: Green Berets
programme.desc: Green Berets are the lords of unconventional warfare. From bolt-action rifles, to the latest air strike laser technology, Green Berets are the masters of multiple weapons systems. See how they operate under the most extreme conditions throughout history.

programme.title: Weaponology: SAS
programme.desc: The SAS go behind enemy lines and have revolutionised the global war on terrorism.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Adolf Hitler
programme.desc: On June 22, 1941, Adolf Hitler launches the largest military offensive in history against the Soviet Union: Operation Barbarossa. Blinded by his fire power, Hitler signs his death sentence.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Charles de Gaulle
programme.desc: June 16, 1940. Paris has fallen to the Nazis and the German conquest of France is almost complete. Prime Minister Henri Petain plans to sign an armistice with Nazi Germany, but French General Charles de Gaulle secedes and rebels against the policy.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Franklin D. Roosevelt
programme.desc: Japanese bombers attack Pearl Harbor and sink a large part of the US Pacific Fleet. President Franklin D. Roosevelt decides it's time for the United States to strike back.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Winston Churchill
programme.desc: May 28, 1940, while the Wehrmacht crushes the allied armies in France, British officials prepare to face Hitler.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Discovering America
programme.desc: Explore the truth behind the men who discovered the New World and take a trip to discover the real facts behind the most famous bridge and road in America.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Epic Inventions
programme.desc: On this special edition, learn the real story behind the most famous flying devices in history and the truth behind our most influential inventors.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Yankees, Rebels and World War II

programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team renovate an off-the-grid hunting cabin deep in the woods of Oxford, ME. They have a budget of $20,000 and a time frame of six weeks. They face many challenges associated with building off-the-grid.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the YMCA
programme.desc: The Kennebec Valley YMCA in Augusta, Maine needs a new play structure and the Cabin Masters know just the crew for the job! Ryan decides to build a workshop for Chase. The team works feverishly to finish both projects before everything freezes over.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Legacy Preserved
programme.desc: The crew pay tribute to an entomologist and late matriarch of an amazing legacy in West Gardiner, Maine, by restoring two rustic cabins on her 113-acre Wakefield Wildlife Sanctuary.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Pilsbury Family Rafting Cabin
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned Maine cabins. They give these forlorn properties the facelift they've needed for decades. You never know what you might find when you go for a walk.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Small Yard, Big Dreams

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Mountain Lodge Oasis

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Paws, Present and Future
programme.desc: Two animal lovers with a heart for rescuing dogs and cats call on Chase Morrill and his team to transform their West Gardiner cabin into a pet sanctuary.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: After three women collectively buy a cabin they describe as 'a diamond in the rough on a pretty lot,' they are determined to prove the naysayers wrong and create the cabin of their dreams.

programme.desc: Alton Brown makes the argument that Italian food was actually invented in America, and that chicken parmesan is the dish where it all began. Yet, an Italian canned tomato makes it all possible.

programme.desc: Learn to make better meatballs, use a muffin pan in new ways and to cook Swedish meatballs, a 60's summer classic.

programme.title: A Football Life: Mike Singletary
programme.desc: The heart and soul of the legendary 1985 Chicago Bears defense, Mike Singletary shares a life full of lessons learned from the game.

programme.title: A Football Life: Charles Haley
programme.desc: The only player in NFL history with five Super Bowl rings, Charles Haley's road to Canton was paved with memorable stops in Dallas and San Francisco.

programme.title: A Football Life: Kevin Greene
programme.desc: The story of the boisterous sack master who blitzed his way to the Pro Football Hall of Fame.

programme.title: A Football Life: Sam Mills
programme.desc: He was once deemed too short to play in the NFL, but Sam Mills became an All-Pro and built a legacy that still looms larger than life.

programme.title: A Football Life: Willie McGinest
programme.desc: Follow Willie McGinest's path from a renowned high school to USC and finally the New England Patriots where he served as a key piece to an NFL dynasty.

programme.title: A Football Life: Lyle Alzado
programme.desc: Lyle Alzado became one of the most dominant pass rushers in the NFL and even fought Muhammad Ali, all while concealing a secret that would rock the sports world.

programme.title: A Football Life: Bruce Smith
programme.desc: Examine the life of the hall of famer who retired as the NFL's all time sack leader and helped lead the Bills to four straight Super Bowl appearances.

programme.title: A Football Life: Lawrence Taylor
programme.desc: See the raw, unfiltered story of Lawrence Taylor's incredible career on the field and his self-destructive life off of the field.

programme.title: A Football Life: John Randle
programme.desc: Look at how John Randle managed to go from an undrafted free agent to a star with the Minnesota Vikings and Seattle Seahawks.

programme.title: Top 10: Hail Marys
programme.desc: With the clock ticking and the game on the line, say a prayer for this countdown of the NFL's top ten Hail Marys of all time.

programme.title: Top 10: Player Comebacks
programme.desc: There's nothing like a great comeback story. We look at the ten best in NFL history.

programme.title: Top 10: High-Powered Offenses
programme.desc: When the whistle blows, these are the 10 best NFL offenses who knew how to put on a show.

programme.title: Top 10: Football Voices
programme.desc: A countdown of the voices that gave football its soul.

programme.title: Top 10: Most Fun Teams Ever
programme.desc: For these teams, it wasn't whether they won or lost but how they played the game. From Cleveland's Kardiac Kids to Houston's Luv Ya Blue a countdown of the most thrilling and beloved teams in NFL history.

programme.title: Top 10: Hail Marys
programme.desc: With the clock ticking and the game on the line, say a prayer for this countdown of the NFL's top ten Hail Marys of all time.

programme.title: 30 for 30: The Two Bills
programme.desc: Look at the relationship between Bill Belichick and Bill Parcells, two coaches that will eventually be enshrined together in the Hall of Fame.

programme.title: A Football Life: Bill Walsh
programme.desc: Bill Walsh was labeled a genius, but he also was an insecure, tortured artist. After revolutionizing the NFL with the 'Team of the '80s', he wrote a book that has become the bible for generations of football coaches.

programme.title: A Football Life: Jerry Jones
programme.desc: Follow Jerry Jones's career from humble beginnings as a greeter in his parents' grocery store in Arkansas to his induction into the Pro Football Hall of Fame.

programme.title: A Football Life: Steve Sabol
programme.desc: A Football Life looks back at Steve Sabol's extraordinary career and the lasting legacy he left behind.

programme.desc: Learn how a Muslim in Mali, a Shinto in Japan and an Episcopalian in New York City worship.

programme.title: Xavier Riddle and the Secret Museum
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of Xavier Riddle, his sister Yadina and their friend Brad. The three face problems and must turn to the Secret Museum to help solve them. The Secret Muesum allows them to travel back in time to meet real-life historical figures.

programme.title: Peg + Cat: The Richard the Third Problem/ The Lemonade Problem
programme.desc: At Richard’s family’s competitive annual picnic, Peg and Cat try to help Richard not come in third for all the events. Later, When Peg realizes her lemonade stand has no cups, Cat has to make a series of deals to get 200 cups with two cookies.

programme.title: Cyberchase: A Day at the Spa
programme.desc: Hacker finds the Krystal of Kalmoor, the powerful orb that will him eternal power. By possessing the Krystal, Hacker can roam cyberspace and create havoc without having to recharge his power.

programme.title: SciGirls: Baile Digital/ Digital Dance
programme.desc: The SciGirls use everyday science to accomplish extraordinary feats.

programme.title: Nova: Bigger Than T.Rex
programme.desc: Almost a century ago, paleontologists found fossil bones from a dinosaur that was bigger than Tyrannosaurus rex. New bones in Morocco have reopened the investigation into this epic beast. Paleontologists reconstruct the carnivore.

programme.title: History Detectives: Lauste Film Clip, Baker's Gold, Transatlantic Cable
programme.desc: A collector believes he has a clip from the first ever talking picture. Wes Cowan explores Gold Rush territory. A Cape Cod beachcomber finds what he believes is a section of the first transatlantic cable.

programme.title: Africa's Great Civilizations: Commerce and the Clash of Civilizations
programme.desc: Gates explores the dynamism of 19th century Africa, the 'Scramble' by European powers for its riches, and the defiant and successful stand of uncolonized Ethiopia.

programme.title: Genius by Stephen Hawking: What Are We?
programme.desc: Scientist Stephen Hawking challenges three ordinary people to find out what we really are. Self-assembling machines, light-up bacteria and the world’s first physical demonstration of evolution in action conspire to revolutionize their view of life.

programme.title: Nova: Bigger Than T.Rex
programme.desc: Almost a century ago, paleontologists found fossil bones from a dinosaur that was bigger than Tyrannosaurus rex. New bones in Morocco have reopened the investigation into this epic beast. Paleontologists reconstruct the carnivore.

programme.title: The Great American Read: Other Worlds
programme.desc: Take a magical journey to another world through some of America's best-loved novels. From Middle Earth to Lilliput, the trials and tribulations of these alternate universes help us to better understand our own world.

programme.title: American Masters: Ursula K. Le Guin
programme.desc: Explore the remarkable life and legacy of late feminist author Ursula K. Le Guin whose groundbreaking work, including 'The Left Hand of Darkness,' transformed American literature by bringing science fiction into the literary mainstream.

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic: Little Women
programme.desc: Set against the backdrop of the Civil War, this story follows sisters Jo, Meg, Beth and Amy March on their journey from childhood to adulthood. With the help of their mother, the girls navigate what it means to be a young woman.

programme.title: The Roosevelts: An Intimate History: Get Action (1858-1901)
programme.desc: A frail, asthmatic young Theodore Roosevelt transforms himself into a vigorous champion of the strenuous life, loses one great love and finds another, leads men into battle and then rises like a rocket to become the youngest president in American history.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Svengali
programme.desc: When a college student is found murdered, detectives suspect a copycat serial killer.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Baggage
programme.desc: The brutal murder of an artist leads detectives to a long string of murders by a serial killer that Detective Victor Moran has been following for months. Moran fights to keep control of the case while Fin and Stabler struggle to find the killer.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Liberties
programme.desc: A judge presiding over a harassment case asks the detectives for their help in solving a 30-year-old kidnapping.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Anchor
programme.desc: After two girls are murdered in similar ways, Tutuola's investigation leads him to the Center of Immigrant Services. Learning that the girls are 'anchor babies' of immigrant families, he delves into the Center's history and current issues.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Bedtime
programme.desc: When an investigative journalist is found murdered in her bed, it reminds the detectives of a case from 30-years earlier.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Pursuit
programme.desc: When the host of a television series receives personal threats, her life-long pursuit to find her sister's abductor emerges. Detectives are joined in the investigation by an ADA who may be too involved in the case.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Hunting Ground
programme.desc: Benson and Haden's romantic weekend is interrupted by the news of a young girl gone missing. While looking into her disappearance, they find several other cases that might be related.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Ace
programme.desc: When a pregnant woman is raped, Olivia and Elliot arrive at the hospital and learn that she fled. Through their investigation, they discover an illegal adoption ring and must go undercover to expose it.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Manhattan Vigil
programme.desc: A young boy is kidnapped while in the care of his father and the detectives remember a similar crime from 13 years before.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Depravity Standard
programme.desc: Benson seeks justice in the trial of child abductor Lewis Hodda, when the plea deal is rejected, Barba must rely on decades-old evidence to make his case.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Hysteria
programme.desc: Detectives learn that the latest victim in a string of prostitute murders is a cultured college student.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Countdown
programme.desc: When a serial rapist-murderer is on the loose, detectives race against the clock to find him before he strikes again.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Wrath
programme.desc: Three unrelated people, connected to cases handled by Detective Benson, are found murdered.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Execution
programme.desc: Time is running out for a death row inmate who holds the answers to another tragic case.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Werewolves
programme.desc: The team uncovers unusual evidence in the murder of a man who looked like a werewolf. After learning that hypertrichosis, the 'human werewolf syndrome,' runs in the victim's family, Willows and Stokes return to the crime scene to gather further evidence.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Omni
programme.desc: The NCIS: LA team must find who compromised a classified vaccine project from a bio tech company. Meanwhile, Deeks struggles with his emotions upon returning to the field.

programme.title: NCIS: Rule Fifty-One

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Docks

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Beautiful Friendship

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Call It Macaroni

programme.desc: The bounty on Halstead's head becomes a serious reality as an innocent bartender takes a bullet meant for him. Olinsky tries to reason with Bembenek to call off the hit, while Voight and his team search for the hired assassin.

programme.title: Frasier: Frasier Loves Roz
programme.desc: When Roz decides to date one of Niles' patients, Frasier tries to find a way to warn Roz without breaching his ethical obligation for confidentiality. Roz soon mistakes his attempts to warn her for subtle declarations of yearning.

programme.title: Frasier: The Focus Group
programme.desc: Frasier is puzzled when a single member of a focus group dislikes his radio show. Frasier's quest to understand why becomes an obsession and he inadvertently ruins the man's life.

programme.title: Frasier: You Can Go Home Again
programme.desc: To celebrate Frasier's third anniversary at the radio station, Roz gives Frasier a copy of his first broadcast. As he listens, Frasier remembers the events that occurred when he first arrived in Seattle and reunited with his family.

programme.title: Frasier: The Two Mrs. Cranes
programme.desc: When Daphne's ex-fiancé comes to visit, she quickly introduces him to her 'new husband,' Niles. Martin stirs up trouble when he decides to introduce Roz as Maris.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Equal Rights
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel manage to get their husbands to agree with equal rights.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Baby Pictures
programme.desc: The Ricardos vow to not show off Ricky's baby pictures, but their resolve weakens.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Tells the Truth
programme.desc: Lucy vows to tell the truth for 24 hours in order to win a bet.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The French Revue
programme.desc: Lucy plays different roles with the goal of crashing Ricky's nightclub show.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Big Daddy
programme.desc: Blanche's father, Big Daddy, comes to Miami for a visit, with an announcement; he's sold the family plantation and is setting out to become a country singer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Way We Met
programme.desc: One night after watching 'Psycho', the girls find it hard to sleep so they stay up and reminisce about how they all came to live with one another.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: End of the Curse
programme.desc: Blanche is mortified after taking a pregnancy test which indicates she's pregnant. Then after visiting her doctor, she learns the truth, she's beginning menopause.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ladies of the Evening
programme.desc: The house is fumigated and the girls move into a Miami Beach hotel. Previously, Blanche had won three tickets to see the opening of Burt Reynolds new movie and passes to the party held afterwards where they could meet him.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Take Him, He's Mine
programme.desc: Dorothy dumps a depressed Stan on Blanche so that she can go out with a naval officer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: It's a Miserable Life
programme.desc: The girls petition to save an old oak tree on the property of a hateful woman.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actress Christina Anthony from Mixed-ish visits. TV chef and cookbook author Nick Stellino prepares browned pork chops.

programme.title: Movie: Destination Wedding
programme.desc: A woman has been painstakingly planning her sister's destination wedding for the longest time and as guests arrive on a beach paradise, she runs into her ex-boyfriend, who also happens to be the best man.

programme.title: Movie: Eat, Play, Love
programme.desc: A veterinarian makes it her habit to stop by the local dog shelter whenever she can. She does this not only because of her love for dogs, but also because she is secretly in love with the shelter owner.

programme.title: Movie: A Winter Princess
programme.desc: Longing for the chance to test herself and her skills apart from the influences of her royal title, a princess has been living and working incognito at a ski resort as assistant event planner.

programme.title: Movie: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre named Shrek finds his swamp home overrun with exiled fairytale creatures, including a talkative companion named Donkey. Shrek strikes a deal: he will get his swamp back if he rescues Princess Fiona and brings her to the scheming Lord Farquaad.

programme.title: Movie: Shrek Forever After
programme.desc: When Shrek is burdened with a mid-life crisis, Rumpelstiltskin tricks him into allowing himself to be sent to an alternate world where Rumpel is the ruler.

programme.title: Movie: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre named Shrek finds his swamp home overrun with exiled fairytale creatures, including a talkative companion named Donkey. Shrek strikes a deal: he will get his swamp back if he rescues Princess Fiona and brings her to the scheming Lord Farquaad.

programme.title: Movie: Tommy Boy
programme.desc: A young man is faced with the task of saving his father's plant and hometown economy.

programme.title: South Park: All About the Mormons?
programme.desc: A Mormon kid moves to South Park and it's up to Stan to beat him up. But when Stan and his dad meet their new Mormon neighbours, they become fascinated with how genuinely nice they are.

programme.title: South Park: Pee
programme.desc: The boys' fun-filled day at the water park turn deadly when the pool's pee vs. water ratio reaches catastrophic levels.

programme.title: South Park: The Return of the Fellowship of the Ring to the Two Towers
programme.desc: The boys embark upon a mythical quest as they set out to return their copy of the 'The Lord of the Rings' movie to the Two Towers video store. Unknown to them, they are really carrying the most degraded porno ever made.

programme.title: South Park: Do the Handicapped Go to Hell?
programme.desc: The boys become obsessed with religion and redemption after they're scared by a sermon about Hell. Meanwhile, Saddam returns to Hell and tries to have Satan's new boyfriend 'taken care of.'

programme.title: South Park: Probably
programme.desc: When their church's answers aren't sufficient to sate the boys' fear, they break off from their church and Cartman takes on the role of evangelical preacher. Meanwhile in Hell, the feud between Chris and Saddam continues.

programme.title: South Park: Stanley's Cup
programme.desc: Hitting rock bottom, Stan finds himself without a job, no bicycle and the only way out of his situation is to coach the peewee hockey team. Stan is about to find out that being a coach means facing his past, reliving a life he would rather leave behind.

programme.title: South Park: Major Boobage
programme.desc: In a South Park homage to the 1981 film, 'Heavy Metal,' the boys are trying to get Kenny off the latest drug craze that's captured the junior high and under set.

programme.title: South Park: Night of the Living Homeless
programme.desc: Ignoring the homeless in South Park becomes impossible when their numbers become overwhelming and their lust for spare change becomes insatiable. The boys devise a plan to rid the town of homeless once and for all.

programme.title: South Park: The Cissy
programme.desc: Randy is harboring a giant secret and the pressure is getting to him. Meanwhile, Cartman calls Stan a cissy.

programme.title: South Park: Dances With Smurfs
programme.desc: Cartman is chosen to do the morning announcements at South Park Elementary.

programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called to retrieve a dead body, they do a background check on the victim. The trail leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skin of Her Teeth
programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Line of Fire
programme.desc: A fundamentalist group starts attacking and robbing banks in the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Blood

programme.desc: A respected surgeon in an upscale waterfront apartment community is murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marathon Man
programme.desc: When a man's body is found near the ranch his family owns, his wife claims he went jogging. But police doubt that story.

programme.title: Legend of Deep Blue
programme.desc: Shark experts head to Guadalupe Island to search for the largest great white in the world. If they find Deep Blue, they may be able to shed light on the mysteries of these 'mega sharks'.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Naked and Afraid of Sharks Pt. 1
programme.desc: Five all-star survivalists are stranded on a barren island in the middle of the most shark-infested waters on Earth for 14 days with no food, water or clothes.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Naked and Afraid of Sharks Pt. 2
programme.desc: All-star survivalists must overcome challenges, like deadly insects and brutal storms, and put their skills to the test to survive exclusively on what the ocean provides.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Biting Back At Africa
programme.desc: In a unique four-person challenge, a lion attack survivor returns to Africa to face her fears. Surrounded by lions, crocodiles and cape buffalo, the tribe of four struggles against constant threats and each other as they try to survive in a kill zone.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Uncensored: Trying to Deal with the Devil
programme.desc: With extra footage and bonus scenes: A Canadian mountain man teams up with an experienced homesteader to take on Devil's Canyon, deep in Mexico's Baja desert. The intense heat, scarce water and venomous predators threaten their survival.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Punishment in Panama
programme.desc: Clint Jivoin and Laura Zerra are Naked and Afraid on a Panamanian island for 21 days. Plagued by sand flies and threatened by snakes and crocodiles the pair have to stick together using all their skills and experience to survive in the tropical hell.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Biting Back At Africa
programme.desc: In a unique four-person challenge, a lion attack survivor returns to Africa to face her fears. Surrounded by lions, crocodiles and cape buffalo, the tribe of four struggles against constant threats and each other as they try to survive in a kill zone.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Frozen in Fear
programme.desc: A marine biologist and a Special Forces veteran risk hypothermia at every turn as they take on Canada with no clothes. Bitter cold, torrential rain and wandering bears and moose make every night a struggle, and an obstinate chipmunk pushes their patience.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Primal Fear
programme.desc: Mountain man Luke and a homeschooling mom and triathlete named Lindsey are dropped into the dry and thorny landscape of Africa's Namibia, surrounded by some of the deadliest apex predators on the continent.

programme.title: Inside the FBI
programme.desc: Agents from the San Diego FBI office share details of ongoing cases including a Mexican Mafia takedown and a drug cartel mass murder.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: The Shorty Short VW Bus
programme.desc: When Richard buys a VW Microbus no one really knows the mechanics of this German car. Later, Richard and Aaron discover that the Fired Up garage is attending a demolition derby and Richard has a trick up his sleeve to send his former employees reeling.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: NHRA and a '55 Pink Caddy, Part II
programme.desc: After a constant wait for parts for the '55 Pink Caddy, the monkeys make a mad dash to get the car done on time. Meanwhile, Richard ventures into new territory as his Gas Monkey Dragster hits the Texas Motorplex for the NHRA qualifying runs.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Back to the '80s in a '68 Coronet
programme.desc: Richard buys a '69 Malibu only to realize there are massive issues. Aaron crashes into a '68 Coronet on the GMG lot. Richard travels to St. Louis to buy a tricked out '79 Camaro. Motley Crue performs at Gas Monkey Live grand opening.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Rocking '76 G10 Van
programme.desc: Richard and Aaron take on a different build when they to transform a $300 find on the side of the road into a '76 Exploration van. The Dale Earnhardt '56 Nomad makes an appearance back at the shop, as KC and his team are tasked with fixing the body.

programme.title: Driven: Shelby's Secret Project
programme.desc: Beau Boeckmann and the Galpin Crew resurrect a one-of-a-kind Pantera that Carroll Shelby hot-rodded for a secret project with Lee Iacocca. Meanwhile, a celebrity client arrives to pick up his restored '68 Charger with modern muscle under the hood.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Tuxedo Rod
programme.desc: Steve trades in his trademark rust for a shiny paintjob when he tackles a 1965 Lincoln Continental for a flashy bartender from L.A. The problem is parts for this boat are impossible to find.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Pickup Rod
programme.desc: Steve yanks a 1949 Ford F1 out of a farmer's field and battles to transform it into an eye-popping promotional vehicle with a cowboy-biker theme for a couple of his dad's old friends.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Fruit Rod
programme.desc: When a California fruit farmer with a taste for hot rods asks Steve for a 1954 GMC COE truck he decides to take it over the top; with a 1200-horsepower engine mounted behind the cab, the crew begin their love affair with the baddest truck ever made.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Bitchin' Rod
programme.desc: Steve's younger brother Dusty has flown in from Montana. He's always wanted his own rat rod and brings Steve a limited budget and a dream. The only problem is Steve gets a little carried away and sinks a major chunk of his own change into it.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Wagon Rod
programme.desc: The Welderup crew transforms a '57 Chevy Wagon from a grocery grabber into one nasty ride.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Ditch Digger
programme.desc: A father and son team gets a badass hauler for their construction company. Steve's sons help with the build, making this rebuild of a classic '31 International Truck a family affair in more ways than one in Welderup's new shop.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drum and Drummer

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Beware the Bucket
programme.desc: Two teams of best friends enter the Pepperdome with confidence, but Chef Willie's demonic sauces bring them down hard and early.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: No Sugar, Tons of Spice
programme.desc: Two teams duke it out against the catastrophic concoctions from Chef Willie.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Fighting Back the Tears
programme.desc: Gym-loving ladies power through the pain while bartending besties try to knock back the heat. The fight for $25,000 is not easy. Friendships will strain, people will cry, and stomachs will be destroyed in the pepperdome.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: TKOMG
programme.desc: Cocky sisters challenge best bros in the Pepperdome. However, the sauce proves too hot to handle for one team, resulting in the first TKO.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fast Feud

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Toll Booth Corrector
programme.desc: The guys pose as suspicious nutritionists trying to recruit clients, before quitting their jobs for strange reasons. Afterwards, the gang goes head-to-head in a wild debate judged by a stranger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Three Men and Your Baby

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Swim Shady
programme.desc: The guys hit some bad reception working at a desk. Plus, tonight's big loser takes photos of a water aerobics class, but ends up drowning in shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Wrapper's Delight
programme.desc: The guys make a mockery of each other while acting as restaurant managers, sing along with strangers trying to name that (made up) tune. The loser gets wrapped up in a birthday surprise that definitely wasn't on his wish list.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Heckle and Hide
programme.desc: The guys ask strangers for a little help with big items at the grocery store, and give entrepreneurial tips to some unfortunate souls. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out at a little league softball game while posing as 'that dad.'

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Centaur of Attention

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Good, the Bad and the Punished
programme.desc: The guys pose as cranky NY cab drivers, then solicit undeserved congrats in the park. Then, tonight's loser is sheriff of an old Nevada town.

programme.desc: Former actress Heather fought a flesh-eating disease that left her with no breasts. Dr. Dubrow helps a spiritual woman who has a butt on her belly and Dr. Nassif helps a man whose doctor left a thumbprint on his nose.

programme.desc: The doctors take a gamble in Sin City, helping a young woman whose autoimmune disease may have triggered her deformed breasts.

programme.title: Botched By Nature: This Little Piggy Went to Surgery
programme.desc: The doctors travel to Texas to meet a female war veteran that was struck by lightning leaving her breasts and body disfigured. Then, they head to South Carolina to consult with a woman who has a misplaced toe on each foot.

programme.title: Botched By Nature: Double Trouble and a Chest Bubble
programme.desc: The Doctors travel to Iowa to see a young father whose infected chest implant is threatening his life. Later, they meet a pair of twins with matching cleft deformities who want to look more identical.

programme.desc: Paul and Terry take their surgical expertise to patients who have been botched by nature.

programme.title: Botched By Nature: The Chronicles of Hernia
programme.desc: Travel to Virginia to meet a young woman with severely deformed breasts. Later, a doctor becomes patient when a serious medical condition arises.

programme.title: Botched By Nature: Boobs and Tubes
programme.desc: The doctors set out for Vegas to meet a young mother born with Pectus excavatum, and whose underlying breast issues are getting harder to deal with. In Chicago, they consult with a woman born pre-maturely with nasal complications as an adult.

programme.title: Botched By Nature: Collapsed In and Busted Out
programme.desc: Doctors Dubrow and Nassif head to Arizona to help a woman whose nose collapsed into her own face. In NYC, they meet a college student with an extremely oversized breast, and later ride through Central Park checking up on the HBIC, Tiffany Pollard.

programme.title: Botched By Nature: Lip Service
programme.desc: The doctors visit a young mother in Detroit suffering from Tubular Breast Deformation. Later, they consult with a woman in Atlanta whose tumor has left overgrown tissue in her mouth. Before leaving the ATL, they visit past patient Dwight Eubanks.

programme.title: Botched: Shake What Your Momma Didn't Give You
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow helps a woman who has gone to desperate measures to fix her breasts while Dr. Nassif takes on a patient whose surgeon poked a hole through her nose.

programme.desc: A mother of two has to duct tape up her breasts, and later, a young nurse has nose raved by nasal file. A D-list celebrity would like to get an A-list nose.

programme.desc: Four professional pizza makers rise to the occasion in three pizza-themed Grocery Games that determine who gets to take home all the dough. Guy Fieri challenges the chefs to shop for the ingredients in their signature pizza using only a mini pizza box.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: High-Roller Games
programme.desc: Money is no object for the four competing chefs as Guy Fieri declares it's High-Roller Night in Flavortown. First, Guy turns the GGG classic budget battle on its head by demanding the chefs spend over $60 when making their signature high-end dinner.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Maggie the Magnificent
programme.desc: Technology from California is brought to the aquarium to monitor beluga whale activity. Maggie the Asian small-clawed otter's training kicks in when receiving a shot, and Morty the sea star undergoes a checkup after suspicious growths form.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Ghost Gators
programme.desc: The team is eager to open their new alligator exhibit featuring rare albino gators. Sea otter Gibson is tested for a possible infection, and divers must swim with Taroko the whale shark to get a blood sample.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Expedition Whale Shark
programme.desc: Aquarium staff travel to the remote island of St. Helena to gain footage of whale sharks in their natural habitat during mating season. Spotted ribbontail ray Francis is introduced to her new tank friends, and Cerbie the seal is treated for joint pain.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Unfiltered: Four Chicks and Counting
programme.desc: The African penguin colony welcome their newest additions after a successful mating season. Sea otter Mara is introduced to the rest of the raft, and the wild bottlenose dolphin population in Florida is examined.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Wildlife Games
programme.desc: As winter melts into spring, wardens handle a rabid pit bull and gather new evidence regarding a deer poaching case. Then, a dumpster-diving bear hides from Warden Marquis and Fitzpatrick, while a woodchuck plays games with Warden Lounder.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Unfiltered: Four Chicks and Counting
programme.desc: The African penguin colony welcome their newest additions after a successful mating season. Sea otter Mara is introduced to the rest of the raft, and the wild bottlenose dolphin population in Florida is examined.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Canopy Clubhouse
programme.desc: With a budget as high as the trees, a family in Bedford, NY hires Pete to design a dream clubhouse for the entire family. With a big BBQ patio, a living room and a lofted chalkboard covered playroom, Pete's surprise treehouse brings fun for all ages.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Sky High Spa
programme.desc: An entrepreneur from Austin, Texas hires Pete to a spa treehouse on her ranch. Pete faces plumbing challenges and builds an extravagant spa with a steam shower and a Japanese soaking tub.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Luck O' the Irish Cottage
programme.desc: An Irish family in Orange County, CA has the perfect olive tree in their backyard to nestle a Celtic-themed cottage.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Backyard Bungalow
programme.desc: Faced with the need to expand their home after their daughter returns from college, a family in Medford, Ore. calls Pete to expand their not-so-empty-nest. Faced with evolving client requests, Pete transforms his design into a multi-faceted guesthouse.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Love Is in the Air
programme.desc: An adventurous couple wants to host their wedding at Treehouse Point, but all of the existing treehouses are booked. With some quick thinking, Pete convinces his family to make room for a new addition, and constructs a magical honeymoon suite.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Mile-High Man-cave
programme.desc: Pete builds his manliest and largest treehouse yet for a Texas dad who wants to spend some man-time in the trees. At nearly 1000 square feet, this treehouse comes with its own 600-pound custom meat smoker and water gun turrets to fend off the girls.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Alaskan Grit: Brink of Disaster
programme.desc: The family's barter for their wind turbine is threatened when they can't salvage enough wood. The goal of generating their own power for Brown Town hangs in the balance as the freeze settles in.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Alaskan Grit: The Price of the Bush
programme.desc: Living in the bush always comes with a price, and for the Browns the harsh existence may be taking its toll on one family member.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Alaskan Grit: Browntown Closedown?
programme.desc: Ami's health is still in question which means the Browns are still away from Browntown in order be near the proper facilities. The further they are away from home, the less likely it seems to return.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Alaskan Grit: Worst Case Scenario
programme.desc: The Brown's worst fears are realized when Ami's biopsy results come back. The wolf pack will be divided so that some can care for Ami, while others keep Browntown alive.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Alaskan Grit: Browntown Boom
programme.desc: Shorthanded in Browntown, the family fights to salvage their dream, but a major accident puts another member of the Wolfpack in the hospital.

programme.title: Movie: When the Bough Breaks

programme.desc: When a clock radio was found in a bathtub full of water with our victim, it's up to Kelly and Yolanda to determine if it was an accident or if she met with a more sinister fate.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Devoted (Fort Walton Beach, FL)
programme.desc: A vivacious mother of two mysteriously vanishes from beautiful Fort Walton Beach, FL. Just three days later, several people receive a cryptic group text from her but never hear from her again.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Trajectory
programme.desc: The team is back in small town America where they hope to uncover the truth behind the mysterious death of a young man that occurred just a few years ago. State police from across the country will try to help get to the bottom of what really happened.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Still of the Night (Pocatello, ID)
programme.desc: A sweet young woman was found brutally stabbed to death in her bedroom. Kelly and Yolanda are in the precarious position of finding her killer amidst multiple possible suspects.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Miss Congeniality (Yakima County, WA)
programme.desc: A young mother of three is found shot to death in her car that was pulled over on the side of a highway. Kelly and Yolanda face the difficult task of find a killer who seemed to disappear under the dark cover of night.

programme.title: Cold Justice: One of Our Own
programme.desc: Kelly Siegler and her team of investigators are back and diving into a small town murder case that lingered for years without answers or justice. Working on her home turf in Texas, Kelly investigates a cold case she’s never forgotten.

programme.title: Family Guy: Send in Stewie, Please

programme.title: Family Guy: Con Heiress

programme.title: Family Guy: Dog Bites Bear
programme.desc: Stewie and Brian get into a friendship-ending fight after Brian commits a terrible act to one of Stewie's beloved toys. Meanwhile, Peter refuses to wash his hand after meeting his favourite breakfast cereal mascot, Boo Berry.

programme.title: Family Guy: Big Trouble in Little Quahog
programme.desc: After Brian teases Stewie for being small, Stewie invents a shrinking machine that results in both of them shrinking to a microscopic size.

programme.title: Family Guy: Bri, Robot
programme.desc: Brian worries about the legacy he's leaving behind, so Stewie makes a robot duplicate as a living biography.

programme.title: Family Guy: Switch the Flip
programme.desc: To help get Brian's life in order, Stewie and Brian swap bodies using a machine that Stewie invents, but chaos quickly ensues around Quahog when the machine goes haywire.

programme.title: Family Guy: The Woof of Wall Street
programme.desc: Brian convinces Stewie to teach him how to invest in the stock market after learning Stewie has a knack for making money from it. Meanwhile, Peter, Quagmire, Cleveland and Joe look after the Drunken Clam while Jerome is away.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Kingdom of the Vanished

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Ark of the Convenant
programme.desc: The Biblical mystery of the whereabouts of the Ark of the Covenant is unravelled on a quest across continents. Believed to be the throne of God himself, the search for the Ark leads us to where many are convinced is its current resting place, Ethiopia.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Forbidden History tells true stories about treasure, conspiracies, and lost civilizations.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Swamp of Despair
programme.desc: In a remote Louisiana swamp, the ruins of a massive industrial operation suggest that something evil once happened here, and new discoveries at this eerie site reveal what these abandoned buildings were for and why they were deserted.

programme.desc: This episode includes gingerbread houses, livestock trailers, hangar doors, and toy figurines.

programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino reveals the mysterious secrets of the Moon, a world permanently tied to our our planet. Using new research, he uncovers the mysterious origin of the moon and how it kick-started life on Earth.

programme.title: The Planets and Beyond: Earth: The Secret History
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino uses the latest science to reveal the strange secrets of planet Earth, and explores whether alien Earths exist elsewhere in the universe.

programme.title: The Planets: Jupiter: King of the Planets

programme.title: The Planets and Beyond: Mercury: The Cursed Planet
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino explores Mercury, a deadly and tiny planet that faces constant attacks from the Sun, and which might one day pose a threat to all life on Earth.

programme.title: The Planets: Saturn: Mysteries Among the Rings
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino reveals the mysterious secrets of Saturn and its rings. Using the latest science from the Cassini mission, he explores the planet's giant icy geysers, powerful hurricanes, and the moon that may be hiding extraterrestrial life.

programme.title: American Justice: Framed
programme.desc: The shocking story of Clarence Brandley, an innocent man convicted of murder.

programme.title: American Justice: Crime Family
programme.desc: A profile of infamous mob boss Vito Genovese and how he built the most ruthless and powerful crime family in the nation. Includes interviews with Genovese's godson, FBI agents and prosecutors.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Those We Rely On
programme.desc: It's an emotional night on the Nightwatch in New Orleans as one EMS officer tells his partner that this is their last night on the job.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Officer Down
programme.desc: After a quiet beginning of the evening, multiple calls virtually explode across the radio at once, and the most alarming code heard is for 'Officer Shot.'

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Sergeant Joe McHale and his tactical team are called in to coax an unstable man out of his hotel room after he stabs a hotel employee. But when the man turns the knife on himself, McHale and his squad must act quickly to save a life.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Officer Tim Davis' morning run is interrupted by a barricaded gunman who has taken two women hostages, his sister and his girlfriend. Then the already nerve-racking domestic dispute grows even more tense when gunshots ring out inside the home.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Charles 'Chip' Huth and Kansas City SWAT head out on a high-stakes drug-warrant. The team will make simultaneous hits on two locations in the same apartment complex.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: Corporal Rich Emberlin and Corporal Robert Cockerill must charge into a house to nab a murder suspect who allegedly knifed his neighbour to death; in their off hours, Emberlin tries desperately to get his ex-girlfriend back and Cockerill gets in shape.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: A car used to rob a large cache of assault rifles is found parked outside a house in a Dallas suburb; a sniper must call out a possibly armed and dangerous suspect from his home; but when a young boy comes out, all strategies must be changed.

programme.title: Body Cam: 90 Minutes
programme.desc: Police pursue a father and son, plus, an officer's life changes when he comes face-to-face with an armed suspect.

programme.title: Body Cam: Knife's Edge
programme.desc: In Ohio a man shoots his ex. She flees and violence erupts when an officer finds him. In Utah police are called to a house where a mother and children have escaped a suspect armed with a machete. In California a therapist is attacked by a former patient.

programme.title: Body Cam: My Name is Death
programme.desc: Officers confront a knife-wielding suspect. In Florida, a man who flees into the woods is outsmarted by a K9 Officer. In Indiana, a gunman wages war on police, caught on surveillance cameras, until SWAT closes in.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Life and Death of Amie Harwick
programme.desc: An investigation into the death of a Hollywood therapist and whether the system did enough to protect her from alleged killer Gareth Pursehouse.

programme.title: The West Memphis Three: An ID Murder Mystery: The Devil's Work
programme.desc: Three eight-year-old boys are murdered, mutilated and hogtied in a watery ditch in West Memphis, Arkansas. Police suspect three teenagers they believe have ties to Satanism. Soon, locals come forward with startling information.

programme.title: The West Memphis Three: An ID Murder Mystery: Satanic Panic
programme.desc: When Jessie Misskelley confesses to the murder of three young boys, he and his friends are arrested, sending West Memphis into a frenzy. The misfit teens are put on trial and their alleged satanic beliefs are at the heart of the prosecution's case.

programme.title: The West Memphis Three: An ID Murder Mystery: Triple Threat
programme.desc: Damien and Jason are found guilty of the triple child murder. Soon, a worldwide movement arises to prove their innocence and new evidence emerges to bolster their case.

programme.title: The West Memphis Three: An ID Murder Mystery: The Devil's Work
programme.desc: Three eight-year-old boys are murdered, mutilated and hogtied in a watery ditch in West Memphis, Arkansas. Police suspect three teenagers they believe have ties to Satanism. Soon, locals come forward with startling information.

programme.title: The West Memphis Three: An ID Murder Mystery: Satanic Panic
programme.desc: When Jessie Misskelley confesses to the murder of three young boys, he and his friends are arrested, sending West Memphis into a frenzy. The misfit teens are put on trial and their alleged satanic beliefs are at the heart of the prosecution's case.

programme.title: The West Memphis Three: An ID Murder Mystery: Triple Threat
programme.desc: Damien and Jason are found guilty of the triple child murder. Soon, a worldwide movement arises to prove their innocence and new evidence emerges to bolster their case.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Life and Death of Amie Harwick
programme.desc: An investigation into the death of a Hollywood therapist and whether the system did enough to protect her from alleged killer Gareth Pursehouse.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: A Slice of Murder
programme.desc: A homicidal manager with a pizza chain unleashes a reign of terror and murder accompanied by his twisted new girlfriend who entices fresh victims.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: The Madness of Two
programme.desc: A retired couple is viciously stabbed to death in their Virginia home, and police work diligently to investigate every lead possible. Soon they find themselves questioning the couple's daughter and her boyfriend.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Lone Star Lust
programme.desc: A woman enters into an affair with her daughter's grandfather, causing a major rift in the family and eventually leading to a bloody Texas showdown.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: The Sergeant and the Schoolgirl
programme.desc: When high school senior Michelle Miller joins the Future Soldiers program, she sees it as the first step to realizing her dream of enlisting in the Army. But a forbidden affair with her recruiter risks her career in the Army, and her future itself.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Love or Family
programme.desc: A high school romance must be kept a secret from a domineering father with traditional values. When the truth comes out, a heartbreaking choice between love and family brings devastating consequences.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Love Behind Bars
programme.desc: An inmate in a West Virginia jail finds love in a hopeless place with a guard, but their love comes at a tragic cost.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: The Book of James
programme.desc: An affair between a married pastor and a member of his flock takes a shocking turn when he proposes a polygamous relationship with his wife. But an unexpected arrival threatens their pledge of secrecy.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: An Officer, Not a Gentleman
programme.desc: A Filipino woman falls for a married US Navy Officer who will do anything to keep his mistress and his money.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: The Sum of Love
programme.desc: A friendship between a math teacher and assistant principal turns into a connection far deeper. But when a possessive estranged husband threatens their relationship and their safety, the pair take drastic measures to protect themselves against him.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Fruit of the Family Tree
programme.desc: A woman searching for acceptance from her family unexpectedly finds passionate love with her uncle. When their families turn on them in the face of taboo, they flee to start a new life in paradise.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: The 22-Year Itch
programme.desc: In January 2003, Curt and Donna Thorngren's 22-year marriage, destroyed by debt, deceit, and drug addiction, ended in murder.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Love Sick
programme.desc: In 2014, police are called to a lifeless body in a trailer in Winona, Missouri. The owners, Jason and Stephanie McClurg, have suffered a series of misfortunes which have put their marriage under enormous pressure. But nobody expected it to lead to murder.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Love, Sex, and Trucking
programme.desc: Frances and Bill Hall Jr. appear to be the perfect couple two kids, a successful business, and a 30-year marriage. But on October 13, 2013, an unexpected encounter leads to a fatality, and the investigation reveals a story of infidelity and obsession.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Strike From the Sky
programme.desc: British light infantry must crash land by glider in Northern France then take and hold two key bridges in the hands of a heavily armed enemy.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Hitler's Death Ray
programme.desc: 5,100 miles from the Earth a solar death ray can be found orbiting the skies. At the thrust of rocket, this solar mirror will obliterate any city. This was the Nazi dream, but discover what the reality was.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Mad Science: Nazi Killer Bugs
programme.desc: Hitler famously said he was against biological weapons, but new evidence shows the Nazis were colluding with experts on germ warfare. They had a deadly plan to launch a disease attack on the Allies that could have even changed the course of the war.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Hitler's Death Ray
programme.desc: 5,100 miles from the Earth a solar death ray can be found orbiting the skies. At the thrust of rocket, this solar mirror will obliterate any city. This was the Nazi dream, but discover what the reality was.

programme.desc: Hitler famously said he was against biological weapons, but new evidence shows the Nazis were colluding with experts on germ warfare. They had a deadly plan to launch a disease attack on the Allies that could have even changed the course of the war.

programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Hatfields and McCoys
programme.desc: The Hatfields (Devil Anse) versus the McCoys (Randall) is one of the most notorious feuds in American history. What starts as Civil War hostility rapidly escalates to kidnapping, illicit love affairs, murder, and a nation-wide turf war.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Johnson County War
programme.desc: In 1880's Wyoming, a feud explodes when ranching homesteaders like Nate Champion face off against cattle barons like Frank Wolcott, over land, power and the future of the American West.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Pleasant Valley War
programme.desc: In the dangerous frontier of Arizona, two ranching families begin as friends, but become locked in an epic battle known as the Pleasant Valley War. It's the deadliest 'family' feud in U.S. history.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Royal Gorge War
programme.desc: When Leadville, Colorado strikes silver in the 1870's, the race is on between the Atchison, Topeka & Santa Fe Railway, and the Denver & Rio Grande Railroad, to be the first to lay tracks through the narrow Royal Gorge.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation
programme.desc: Listen to the astonishing stories behind the liberation of France and hear the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans.
