programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the Bride
programme.desc: Chase and his team are back home in Augusta getting ready for Lance's wedding. Chase gets a call about a little log cabin stuck in a backyard. He sees the cabin as a fun project for the team to work on and present to Lance's lovely bride.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Teaching an Old Cabin New Tricks
programme.desc: For the past 20 years, a family has created lasting memories of their cabin overlooking Harpswell Sound, but the cabin is in need of some work to see the next 20 years and beyond.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Lobster Legacy Shack
programme.desc: A couple inherited their quaint cabin from his grandfather, who originally built the cabin by hand in 1978. With a newly built wharf, the team focus on transforming the former fish and lobster shack into a fun family cabin.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Blue Ridge Mountain Home
programme.desc: Mark and the guys build a massive, and very complicated, log home high in the Blue Ridge Mountains. To make this unique design work, they create an entirely new kind of notch. They work with a local team of craftsmen to pull off this high-stakes build.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Apprentices
programme.desc: In Leicester, North Carolina, three young interns working alongside the Barnwood Builders save an extremely remote cabin in the hills. Back on the Boneyard in West Virginia, the young men are put to the test during the restoration.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: American Muscle
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders create a timber frame barn for a private collection of American muscle cars in Columbus, Texas. Mark visits one of the biggest barns he's ever seen, finds the oldest live oak tree in the state and explores some local history.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood Bonanza
programme.desc: The builders score a major salvage from a barn near one of America's oldest pine forests in Brookville, Pennsylvania. Later, Mark and Sherman visit a local mill that turns reclaimed wood into spectacular products.

programme.desc: The Moss brothers take inspiration from the homeowners Pacific Island heritage and completely transform this backyard. A redwood deck overlooks a traditional Hapa shade structure and drought tolerant native landscaping finishes the yard.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: New Project, New Headache
programme.desc: When a hundred-year-old Victorian home that Nicole wants to renovate sells to other buyers, she convinces them to let her be involved as they work to get it back on the market.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Bathroom Redux
programme.desc: With the exterior of the Harriet Project completely restored, Nicole and the guys move inside and begin demolition to prepare for pluming and electrical work.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Conundrums
programme.desc: Nicole searches for a set of salvaged cabinets to use in the Harriet Project's upper unit kitchen. With her own house still up for sale, Nicole visits the historical society to see if she can discover any new information about the property.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Living Room Revamp
programme.desc: Nicole repairs the hardwood floors in both living rooms of the Harriet Project and searches for replica tile to begin restoring a fireplace in the downstairs unit.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: The Finished Project
programme.desc: With only a few weeks left to finish the Harriet Project, Nicole and the homeowners divide and conquer to complete the lower unit's living room and kitchen. Nicole visits a local high school shop class to work on a radiator cover for the living room.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Overhaul
programme.desc: Nicole teams with basketball superstar LeBron James to renovate a special family's house in his hometown of Akron, Ohio. They gut the dingy, dilapidated kitchen and create an outdoor patio and new driveway for playing basketball.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Hardwood Floors to the Rescue
programme.desc: LeBron James and Nicole renovate the home of a family in need. They transform two bedrooms into three, to give each child their own room.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Bathroom Fit for King James
programme.desc: Downstairs is done at the Akron, Ohio house Nicole is rehabbing with LeBron and his foundation and now attention turns to the bathroom.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Looks Are Everything
programme.desc: The interior is coming along beautifully and now it's time to give the exterior of the family house in Akron a facelift. LeBron and his kids spar off with Nicole in a duel of diggers to tear out the front steps and regrade the yard.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Room of Their Own
programme.desc: Nicole, LeBron and the LeBron James Family Foundation continue with their project to renovate a needy family's home into a renovated beauty.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Mom's Oasis
programme.desc: Hard working mom, Nicole Curtis is on a mission to create a master bedroom for mom Melanie in the final episode of the LeBron James Family Foundation house.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Family Affair
programme.desc: It's a family affair as Nicole tackles an old shack that desperately needs some loving restoration. With the help of her brother, her nephew and her son, Ethan, carpets come up, there's new paint and a new fence.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1729 Kitchen and Living Room Addition
programme.desc: Jeff Devlin heads to a 1729 home to look at the kitchen and living room additions. He brings in reclaimed barn beams to create a threshold in between the rooms, adds a unique blend of rustic cabinetry and makes a coffee table out of a surprise piece.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1760 Classic Colonial Parlor
programme.desc: An 1800s Center Colonial farmhouse addition to a 1760 stone home is turned into a classic parlor with a bar area and a billiards room.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1684 Basement Gut Job
programme.desc: Jeff heads to Aston, PA, to restore the basement of one of the oldest houses in the area. The owners want to use the space for entertaining, so Jeff creates two bar areas, a sitting area, and restores an adjacent space to make a mudroom and entryway.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1760 Guest House Restoration
programme.desc: Jeff restores a kitchen and living room in a 1760 farmhouse for Tracey and Scott, who now use it as a guest house. The house was the original structure on their farm, which now contains a newer main house and several outbuildings.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1700s Master Bedroom and Library
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin restores a master bedroom and library in an amazing stone home in Bucks County, PA. The original home dates back to 1700 but the two rooms sit in additions that came later and lack some of the historic character.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1785 Three-Room Makeover
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin takes on his latest project, a 1785 stone farmhouse owned by the Vitale family in Bucks County, Pennsylvania. Jeff's first task is to give a facelift to the 230-year-old fireplace. He then moves on to the kitchen and mudroom.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1717 Farmhouse Kitchen
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin takes on a kitchen and living area in a rundown 1717 farmhouse. The original hardwood floors are a mess, the foyer and living room are drab and the kitchen addition doesn't match the character of the original house.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: Rundown 1710 Root Cellar
programme.desc: Angie and Tom recruit Jeff and his team to turn their crumbling 1710 root cellar into a welcoming wine cellar.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Some Like It Popped
programme.desc: Noah hits the Big Butler Fair in Prospect, PA., where he tears into the Conevore, filled to the brim with smoked brisket, pork and chicken.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: When Harry Met Salad
programme.desc: Noah Cappe's first stop is the Wayne County Fair in Richmond, Ind., where he takes a stroll with the Walking BBQ, feels the groove of the King with a bacon PB&J quesadilla, goes healthy-ish with a deep fried salad.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Ice Cream Dreams
programme.desc: Noah samples ice cream sensations from sweet to savory. Whether it's piled on top of delicious homemade donuts, or snuggling in-between bacon wafers, these ice cream dream dishes will have you begging for more.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fusion Fiesta
programme.desc: Noah Cappe lifts the lid on the American melting pot to reveal some decadent, delicious results. When fair goers meet fusion foods, the results can only be world domination.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hot Doggin'
programme.desc: Noah visits Maryland for a crab dip smothered dog; California for a cheesy, spicy Chile Relleno dog and a dessert dog covered in whipped cream and chocolate.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Everything's Better With Bacon
programme.desc: Everything's better with bacon and Noah Cappe is here to prove it. Noah travels to festival and fairs across the country, Noah finds the biggest, baddest and best bacon dishes around.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Oaxaca
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores regional specialties in Oaxaca, Mexico. From complex mole negro sauce over Mayan-era tamales and crispy tortilla with pork lard to egg bread dunked in hot chocolate, local tradition flavors each bite.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Jerusalem
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern investigates the rich culinary heritage of Jerusalem. From savory classics like shawarma, falafel, kubbeh and hummus to tempting pastries like halva and bureka, this holy city's edible icons are steeped in history.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: San Diego
programme.desc: From wild vegetables to wild animals, Andrew gets a taste of the unexpected when he visits San Diego.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Austin
programme.desc: The food in Austin can get a little weird but that's a compliment in a city where funky is part of the pioneer spirit.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Best Morning Ever
programme.desc: Tia's best girls enjoy a healthy and flavorful Sunday-funday brunch after practicing some tips to stay fit. Including: fresh fruit smoothie, banana pancakes with blistered berries, flavorful quinoa breakfast bowl with shitakes, and crispy kale chips.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Date Night
programme.desc: Tia and her husband play in the kitchen. He'll surprise her with one of his recipes but Tia won't be outdone.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Girls' Night
programme.desc: It's all about the throwback when Tia cooks some of her favorite recipes for her favorite girlfriends.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Grillin' Out With Dad
programme.desc: Tia spends time with her dad, Tim. Tim helps Tia recreate one of their favorite barbecue recipes and Tia stops by an Asian market to pick up their favorite side dish.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Working Actors Eat, Too
programme.desc: Tia shares her tricks to balancing her hectic schedule as a full-time mom and working actress. She takes us behind the scenes while bringing homemade treats to her hair and make-up team on the set of her new show.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Sizzling South Beach Brunch
programme.desc: A South Beach menu includes a Spanish tortilla with homemade chorizo.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Mexican Brunch
programme.desc: One of bobby's favourite destinations gives him the inspiration for this colorful Mexican meal. Recipes include Mexican corn pancakes and crispy breakfast potatoes with red chile lime hollandaise.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Southern Comfort Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby derives inspiration from the sweet and savoury ingredients of Southern style.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Farmer's Market Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby takes his favorite green market finds to make a healthy weekend brunch. His menu features tomato strata, zucchini pancakes with apricot butter, and seared salmon with a crunchy Brussels sprouts-apple salad.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Beers, Burgers and Bocce in Baltimore
programme.desc: Actor and proud Baltimore native Josh Charles meets up with Michael at his favourite place for crab cakes in a town where everyone fights over where to find the very best. Then, they have a heated round of bocce ball in the Little Italy neighborhood.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Whole Hog Heaven
programme.desc: Michael Symon's in Nashville, where a killer new burger joint encourages you to construct your own custom creations. Then, he hits the heart of Cleveland where a newcomer pushes the boundaries of pub food and house-made brews.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Bacon Knows Best
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, Nev., Michael Symon takes down a towering fortress of succulent ribs and a sandwich that's a meaty trifecta of juicy brisket, pork and sausage.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Scary Good Smoked Meat
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon chows down on fish tacos with housemade blue corn tortillas and a meaty Mexican pizza. In Denver, a local Colorado lamb patty is a remake of a traditional Hawaiian hangover cure, the Loco Moco.

programme.title: Good Eats: Strawberry Sky
programme.desc: Chef/Scientist Alton Brown shares tips on how to make the most of the strawberry season.

programme.title: Good Eats: Yogurt: Good Milk Gone Bad

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Calgary Stampede
programme.desc: At the Calgary Stampede, Noah Cappe indulges in a slice of pizza loaded with edible insects.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Livestock to Lemons
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets a lesson in the meat that makes Texas famous, sampling the Texas chili burger and the big Texas barbecue baked potato. Then he tries a local legend's tamale recipe before rounding off the day with strawberry waffle bombs.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Renaissance to Rio Grande
programme.desc: Young squire Noah Cappe tries his hand at making the King's Court Conch fritters, decadent deep fried peanut butter and jelly brownie bites, a picquant fried green tomato BLT and the cookies and cream sandwich.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Derby Day to Down State

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Farm Pit/ Crock Talk

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Best in Shoe/ Royal Pain
programme.desc: To land the lead role in a play, Alvin wagers Brittany that he can remain in character as a shoe cobbler. When Brittany becomes convinced she's a long lost princess she carries her new royal status a little too far.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Summer Camp/ Blabber Mouth
programme.desc: The Chipmunks help an owner fix up his run-down summer camp and his broken relationship with his brother. Alvin is convinced that Theodore has cursed him to never lie.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Safety Third/ Mister Manners
programme.desc: When Dave refuses to let Alvin get a dangerous toy sports car, Alvin secretly convinces Simon to build him a replica of the car. Alvin must pass a manners course before he gets his dream meeting with the Princess of England.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Fugitives/ Sherlock Chipmunk
programme.desc: When the boys accidently break Dave's new flat screen TV, they decide to become fugitives on the lam. Jeanette and Eleanor act as Sherlock Holmes and Watson when Theodore's teddy bear mysteriously disappears.

programme.desc: Sandy's air supply is destroyed; SpongeBob wants to earn his karate belt.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Strong Man: Beyond the Mountain
programme.desc: An in-depth profile of Hafthor Bjornsson, known for playing Gregor Clegane in 'Game of Thrones.' Follow Bjornsson's journey from his brief career playing basketball in Iceland, his quest to become World's Strongest Man, to actor.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Mandarich
programme.desc: In Jeremy Schaap's longest interview at ESPN, he tells the fascinating life story of 1989 NFL Draft pick Tony Mandarich.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Hilinski's Hope
programme.desc: Seven months after the death of Washington State QB Tyler Hilinski, his parents cope with their grief and memories.

programme.title: E:60: Forever Broncos

programme.desc: Thought-provoking discussion on the day’s sports stories, interviewing celebrities and players with Le Batard’s brand of self-depreciating humor.

programme.title: First Take, Your Take With Jason Fitz
programme.desc: The best of Stephen A. Smith's sports takes and debates with Max Kellerman. This program gives fans the chance to call in and interact with Jason Fitz as he advances topics debated on that day's 'First Take' broadcast.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Cartoon
programme.desc: Jerry is annoyed to find out he is the topic of a one-woman show. Elaine's complaint about a cartoon in The New Yorker gets her an opportunity to submit her own. Kramer decides to stop talking. George's girlfriend resembles Jerry.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Joey Tells Rachel
programme.desc: A guilt-ridden Joey finally fesses up to a speechless Ross about his feelings for Rachel.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Tea Leaves
programme.desc: Rachel hopes to restore her fallen relationship with Joey by conjuring up a big lie.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Pearl Necklace
programme.desc: Max and Caroline attempt to keep faith that Martha Stewart, who tasted and liked one of their cupcakes, will call and help support their business. Meanwhile, Caroline loses a lucky keepsake.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Soft Opening
programme.desc: Business booms for Max and Caroline's new cupcake walk-up window when word spreads about a shocking incident involving a rock star.

programme.title: Entertainers With Byron Allen
programme.desc: Segment features Tiffany Haddish and Rose Byrne, Lin Shaye, Jamie Foxx, Rashida Jones, Billy Dee Williams, Josh Gad, Paul Kim, Kasi Lemmons, Rian Johnson, Joaquin Phoenix, Tiesto, Jonas Blue and Rita Ora.

programme.title: Just for Laughs: Gags: The Fast and the Funniest
programme.desc: Gags include Bye-Bye Bride, Cream Pie Wars, and The Pond Prankster.

programme.title: Just for Laughs: Gags: Hook, Line and Prankster
programme.desc: Hilarious pranks are played on unsuspecting people and the results are caught on tape.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Sherri Shepherd, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Caroline Rhea, and Billy Gardell.

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers: Fisher vs. Sample
programme.desc: A stay-at-home wife believes her deliveryman husband is sleeping with women he meets along his delivery route.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Santa Smokes Cigs/ Pumpkin Spice Lawsuit
programme.desc: A man dressed as Santa says he was unjustly fired for smoking; a textbook is damages by spilled coffee.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Lights Out/ Sounds Fine
programme.desc: Dispute occur over lighting for a dance competition and a faulty alarm system.

programme.title: Right This Minute
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Fndoyan vs. Rolon
programme.desc: A Brooklyn man denies fathering his ex-girlfriend’s three-month-old son after she has revenge sex with another man.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: No Kids in the House/ Driver's Remorse
programme.desc: Children's pool party leads to property damage; a negligent driving instructor.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Click Bait and Switch
programme.desc: Jay Davy met a woman he wouldn't typically give the time of day to but got more than he bargained for. Shay and Drew had been in love since high school until Drew became smitten with someone over Snapchat. A woman Stanley cheated with is stalking him.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: The plaintiff admits that she told the defendant that he wasn’t the father of their second child because she found out he cheated on her. But he is, so she has petitioned the court for a DNA test to prove it.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segment feature the cases 'Not Being Very Neighborly ', ' Stiffing a Worker ' and ' Keeping It All'.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Cases include: Tossing A Tenant, Being Ill Fitting and Restrain That Pit-Bull.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Ankle Break Dance/ Charge It to Jesus
programme.desc: A man sues his dance instructor over a broken leg. A couple sues for abusing credit cards.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A man says he was disqualified from a drag queen competition because his cousin posted about him on social media. Then, a man says the defendant's texting and driving caused an accident resulting in $5000 of damages.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I'll Prove I'm Not a Sexual Predator
programme.desc: Erica says she's haunted by accusations that she sold her kids for drugs and molested them. She wants to find out if her ex made the story up as revenge. Plus, Lauren, who served three years in jail for sexual assault, wants to clear his name.

programme.title: Maury: DNA Test These Men ... Who Did My Wife Have a Baby With?
programme.desc: Hannah needs to know if her co worker Travis or a married man Drake is the father of her baby. DJ was there for Kelly, but when she got pregnant, he did at 180. Kwan cheated on Li and she did the same in retaliation; now Kwan questions Li Li's baby.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Threesome With Two Sisters
programme.desc: Kelsey and her sister Sarah have a most unusual relationship. Sarah suggested to Kelsey that they have a threesome with a guy named Magic!

programme.title: The Mel Robbins Show: Catfished and Lost $1,000,000
programme.desc: Mel investigates how catfishers lure in their victims, and why they can't be prosecuted.

programme.title: Movie: Bruce Almighty
programme.desc: Bruce, a dissatisfied reporter, finds himself endowed with God's powers. At first he is delighted with all of the things he can do, but he quickly learns how difficult it can be to run the world.

programme.title: Movie: Dodgeball: A True Underdog Story
programme.desc: A gym owner is at risk of losing his business unless he can come up with $50,000. He and some of his less-than-average clientele enter a dodgeball competition in order to raise the funds and save the gym from his rival.

programme.title: High Maintenance: Soup
programme.desc: When a snowstorm hits on Christmas eve, Pam-Anne joins her sister Destiny and a motley crew of flight attendants at their usual crash pad in Queens. The Guy celebrates Hanukkah in New York.

programme.title: Movie: Love Actually
programme.desc: Ten different British couples sort out their love lives during the Christmas holidays.

programme.title: Movie: Little
programme.desc: A woman with a high-pressure career is transformed into a younger version of herself.

programme.title: Movie: Notting Hill
programme.desc: The press tests the relationship between a Hollywood star and a London shopkeeper.

programme.title: Movie: American Animals
programme.desc: Four university students bored with their quiet suburban lives begin imagining pulling off a heist like they've seen in countless movies, but as their plans to steal rare books from the college's library take shape decide to actually go through with it.

programme.title: Movie: Blinded by the Light
programme.desc: A teenager learns to live his life and find his voice through the music of Bruce Springsteen.

programme.title: Movie: Chocolat
programme.desc: A mother and daughter open a chocolate shop in a small conservative French village.

programme.title: Movie: Intolerable Cruelty
programme.desc: A divorce lawyer meets his match when he falls for the gold-digger he defeated in court.

programme.title: Movie: Housesitter
programme.desc: An architect meets a habitual liar, who poses as his wife and moves into his dream house.

programme.title: Movie: The Great White Hype
programme.desc: Boxing promoters stage a fight between a black world champion and a white unknown.

programme.title: Movie: Living in Oblivion
programme.desc: A man tries to shoot a movie despite the fact that everything that can go wrong, does.

programme.title: Movie: LOL
programme.desc: A mom strives to reconnect with her teen daughter after reading her racy journal.

programme.title: Movie: Shazam!
programme.desc: A boy has the power to turn into a grown-up superhero.

programme.title: Longhorn Arts & Culture: LBJ Summit on Race: Valerie Jarrett
programme.desc: Moderated by activist Brittany Packnett, Jarrett discusses her time as senior advisor to President Barack Obama, the complex issue of race in America and her hope for the 2020 election.

programme.title: Longhorn Arts & Culture: LBJ Summit on Race: Motown, Sixty Years of 'Hitsville, USA'
programme.desc: Four Motown legends speak on the history and influence of the music, decades of memories and the crucial role that Motown played in integrating America.

programme.title: LHN Stories: XII
programme.desc: Shane Buechele honours a childhood friend every game, Jhonattan Vegas takes a path from Venezuela to the PGA Tour, the author of Dear Andrew discusses his battle with leukemia and Matt Coleman's recruitment builds to on of the best games of his career.

programme.title: LHN Stories: XIII
programme.desc: Jordan and Jerry Windle share a bond and Mo Bamba was shaped by the courts of Harlem. Plus, look at Connor Williams's experience at the NFL draft.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: The Quest
programme.desc: SG-1 and Baal work together to defend Daniel while he uses Merlin's knowledge to construct an anti-Ori weapon.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: Line in the Sand
programme.desc: Mitchell, Carter and Teal'c arrive on a planet being threatened by the Ori. They decide that a line needs to be drawn and that the Ori must not be allowed to advance any further.

programme.desc: Carter ends up in an alternate universe where he changes the course of things.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: The Shroud
programme.desc: The SG-1 team learns of yet another world that has been visited by a Prior of the Ori. The team waits for the Prior's return, only to be shocked by his identity.

programme.desc: Colonel Mitchell returns to Kansas to attend his high-school reunion with Vala, when Stargate Command learns of an attack on SG-1 team members.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: Bad Guys
programme.desc: SG-1 finds an alien museum on another planet, but the crew is mistaken for a group of rebels that have taken hostages.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: Talion

programme.desc: Vala's father Jacek contacts SGC claiming to have vital information that could impact the survival of Earth.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: Dominion
programme.desc: SG-1 gets caught in the middle when Ba'al and Adria compete for domination of the galaxy.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: Unending
programme.desc: SG-1 and General Landry are trapped in a bubble of slow time while Carter tries to find a way to save their ship from an incoming Ori attack.
